(*********************************************************************************

 Limits in slice bicategory

 Contents:
 1. Final object
 2. Products
 3. Inserters
 4. Equifiers

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.
Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.BicategoryLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Unitors.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.Examples.Slice.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Limits.Final.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Limits.Products.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Limits.Pullbacks.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Limits.Inserters.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Limits.Equifiers.

Local Open Scope cat.

(**
 1. Final object
 *)
Section FinalSlice.

          (b : B).

    exact (pr2 f ,, rinvunitor_invertible_2cell _).

    • runitor (pr1 β)) ▹ id₁ b) = pr12 β

    • runitor (pr1 β)) ▹ id₁ b) =
runitor (pr1 α · id₁ b) • ((pr2 α) ^-1 • pr12 β)

f: slice_bicat b

runitor (pr1 β) ▹ id₁ b = runitor (pr1 β · id₁ b)

lassociator (pr1 β) (id₁ b) (id₁ b)
• (runitor (pr1 β) ▹ id₁ b) = pr1 β ◃ runitor (id₁ b)

f: slice_bicat b

pr1 β ◃ lunitor (id₁ b) = pr1 β ◃ runitor (id₁ b)

b: B
ι:= b,, id₁ b: slice_bicat b
f: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ f, ι ⟧

    apply idpath.

f: slice_bicat b

  ?pr1

b: B
ι:= b,, id₁ b: slice_bicat b

pr1 α ==> pr1 β
 exact (rinvunitor _

             • runitor _).

b: B
ι:= b,, id₁ b: slice_bicat b
f: slice_bicat b

  (((rinvunitor (pr1 α) • (pr22 α) ^-1) • pr12 β)
   • runitor (pr1 β))
 exact (bifinal_2cell_property_slice_eq α β).

p, q: α ==> β
p = q

isPredicate

   disp_2cells x (pr2 α) (pr2 β))

b: B
ι:= b,, id₁ b: slice_bicat b
f: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ f, ι ⟧
p, q: α ==> β
pr1 p = pr1 q

    
B: bicat
b: B
ι:= b,, id₁ b: slice_bicat b
f: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ f, ι ⟧
p, q: α ==> β
isPredicate

B: bicat
b: B
ι:= b,, id₁ b: slice_bicat b
f: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ f, ι ⟧
p, q: α ==> β
x: pr1 α ==> pr1 β
isaprop (disp_2cells x (pr2 α) (pr2 β))

      apply cellset_property.
    
B: bicat
b: B
ι:= b,, id₁ b: slice_bicat b
f: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ f, ι ⟧
p, q: α ==> β
pr1 p = pr1 q

    
B: bicat
b: B
ι:= b,, id₁ b: slice_bicat b
f: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ f, ι ⟧
p, q: α ==> β
runitor (pr1 α) • pr1 p = runitor (pr1 α) • pr1 q

    
B: bicat
b: B
ι:= b,, id₁ b: slice_bicat b
f: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ f, ι ⟧
p, q: α ==> β
(pr1 p ▹ id₁ (pr1 ι)) • runitor (pr1 β) =
(pr1 q ▹ id₁ (pr1 ι)) • runitor (pr1 β)

    
B: bicat
b: B
ι:= b,, id₁ b: slice_bicat b
f: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ f, ι ⟧
p, q: α ==> β
pr1 p ▹ id₁ (pr1 ι) = pr1 q ▹ id₁ (pr1 ι)

    
B: bicat
b: B
ι:= b,, id₁ b: slice_bicat b
f: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ f, ι ⟧
p, q: α ==> β
pr12 α • (pr1 p ▹ id₁ (pr1 ι)) =
pr12 α • (pr1 q ▹ id₁ (pr1 ι))

    exact (pr2 p @ !(pr2 q)).
  Qed.

is_bifinal ι

∏ Y : slice_bicat b,
bifinal_2cell_property ι Y × bifinal_eq_property ι Y

    
B: bicat
b: B
ι:= b,, id₁ b: slice_bicat b
bifinal_1cell_property ι
 exact bifinal_1cell_property_slice.
    
B: bicat
b: B
ι:= b,, id₁ b: slice_bicat b
∏ Y : slice_bicat b,
bifinal_2cell_property ι Y × bifinal_eq_property ι Y

f: slice_bicat b

f: slice_bicat b
bifinal_2cell_property ι f
B: bicat
b: B

f: slice_bicat b

B: bicat
b: B
ι:= b,, id₁ b: slice_bicat b
f: slice_bicat b

B: bicat
b: B
ι:= b,, id₁ b: slice_bicat b
f: slice_bicat b
bifinal_eq_property ι f
 exact (bifinal_eq_property_slice f).
  Defined.

  Definition final_in_slice
    : bifinal_obj (slice_bicat b)
    := ι ,, is_bifinal_slice.
End FinalSlice.

(**
 2. Products
 *)
Section ProductSlice.
  Context {B : bicat}
          {pb x y b : B}
          (f : x --> b)
          (g : y --> b)
          (π₁ : pb --> x)
          (π₂ : pb --> y)
          (γ : invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g))
          (cone : pb_cone f g := make_pb_cone _ π₁ π₂ γ)
          (Hpb : has_pb_ump cone).

  
B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
binprod_cone (x,, f) (y,, g)

  
B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
binprod_cone (x,, f) (y,, g)

    
B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
slice_bicat b
B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
slice_bicat b ⟦ ?p, x,, f ⟧
B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
slice_bicat b ⟦ ?p, y,, g ⟧

    
B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
slice_bicat b
 exact (pb ,, π₁ · f).
    
B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
slice_bicat b ⟦ pb,, π₁ · f, x,, f ⟧
 exact (π₁ ,, id2_invertible_2cell (π₁ · f)).
    
B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
slice_bicat b ⟦ pb,, π₁ · f, y,, g ⟧
 exact (π₂ ,, γ).
  Defined.

  Section BinProdUmp1.
    Context (q : @binprod_cone (slice_bicat b) (x,, f) (y,, g)).

    Let other_cone
      : pb_cone f g
      := make_pb_cone
           (pr1 (binprod_cone_obj q))
           (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
           (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                 (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q)))
              (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))).

    Let φ : invertible_2cell
              (pr21 q)
              (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone · (π₁ · f))
      := comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
              (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                 _
                 (inv_of_invertible_2cell
                    (pb_ump_mor_pr1 Hpb other_cone))))
           (rassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _).

    
B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
q: binprod_cone (x,, f) (y,, g)
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 q)
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q)))
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))): pb_cone f g
φ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pr2 (x,, f))
        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (pb_ump_mor_pr1 Hpb other_cone))))
  (rassociator_invertible_2cell
     (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone) 
     (pb_cone_pr1 cone) (pr2 (x,, f))): invertible_2cell (pr21 q)
  (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone · (π₁ · f))
(((pr12 (binprod_cone_pr1 q)
   • ((pb_ump_mor_pr1 Hpb other_cone) ^-1 ▹ f))
  • rassociator (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone)
      (pb_cone_pr1 cone) f)
 • ((pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone ◃ γ)
    • lassociator (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone) π₂ g))
• (pb_ump_mor_pr2 Hpb other_cone ▹ g) =
pr12 (binprod_cone_pr2 q)

pr12 (binprod_cone_pr2 q)

      
B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧

π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧

Hpb: has_pb_ump cone

  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q)))
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))): pb_cone f g

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pr2 (x,, f))

  (rassociator_invertible_2cell
     (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone) 
     (pb_cone_pr1 cone) (pr2 (x,, f))): invertible_2cell (pr21 q)
  (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone · (π₁ · f))
pr12 (binprod_cone_pr1 q)
• (((pb_ump_mor_pr1 Hpb other_cone) ^-1 ▹ f)
   • (((((((id₂ (pr1 Hpb other_cone · π₁ · f)

         • ((pb_1cell_pr2 (pr1 Hpb other_cone)) ^-1
            ▹ g))
        • rassociator (pr1 Hpb other_cone) π₂ g)

pr2 (binprod_cone_pr2 q)
• (((pb_1cell_pr2 (pr1 Hpb other_cone)) ^-1 ▹ g)
   • ((rassociator (pr1 Hpb other_cone) π₂ g
       • lassociator (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone) π₂ g)
      • (pb_ump_mor_pr2 Hpb other_cone ▹ g))) =
pr12 (binprod_cone_pr2 q)

      
B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
q: binprod_cone (x,, f) (y,, g)
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 q)
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q)))
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))): pb_cone f g
φ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pr2 (x,, f))
        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (pb_ump_mor_pr1 Hpb other_cone))))
  (rassociator_invertible_2cell
     (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone) 
     (pb_cone_pr1 cone) (pr2 (x,, f))): invertible_2cell (pr21 q)
  (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone · (π₁ · f))
pr2 (binprod_cone_pr2 q)
• (((pb_1cell_pr2 (pr1 Hpb other_cone)) ^-1 ▹ g)
   • (id₂ (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone · π₂ · g)
      • (pb_ump_mor_pr2 Hpb other_cone ▹ g))) =
pr12 (binprod_cone_pr2 q)

pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧

π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧

Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
q: binprod_cone (x,, f) (y,, g)

  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q)))
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))): pb_cone f g

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell

  (rassociator_invertible_2cell
     (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone) 
     (pb_cone_pr1 cone) (pr2 (x,, f))): invertible_2cell (pr21 q)
  (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone · (π₁ · f))

• (((pb_1cell_pr2 (pr1 Hpb other_cone)) ^-1
    • pb_ump_mor_pr2 Hpb other_cone) ▹ g) =

B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
q: binprod_cone (x,, f) (y,, g)
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 q)
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q)))
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))): pb_cone f g
φ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pr2 (x,, f))
        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (pb_ump_mor_pr1 Hpb other_cone))))
  (rassociator_invertible_2cell
     (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone) 
     (pb_cone_pr1 cone) (pr2 (x,, f))): invertible_2cell (pr21 q)
  (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone · (π₁ · f))
pr2 (binprod_cone_pr2 q)
• (id₂ (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr2 q)) ▹ g) =
pr12 (binprod_cone_pr2 q)

      
B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
q: binprod_cone (x,, f) (y,, g)
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 q)
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q)))
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))): pb_cone f g
φ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pr2 (x,, f))
        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (pb_ump_mor_pr1 Hpb other_cone))))
  (rassociator_invertible_2cell
     (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone) 
     (pb_cone_pr1 cone) (pr2 (x,, f))): invertible_2cell (pr21 q)
  (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone · (π₁ · f))
pr2 (binprod_cone_pr2 q)
• id₂ (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr2 q) · g) =
pr12 (binprod_cone_pr2 q)

      apply id2_right.
    Qed.

    
B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
q: binprod_cone (x,, f) (y,, g)
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 q)
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q)))
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))): pb_cone f g
φ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pr2 (x,, f))
        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (pb_ump_mor_pr1 Hpb other_cone))))
  (rassociator_invertible_2cell
     (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone) 
     (pb_cone_pr1 cone) (pr2 (x,, f))): invertible_2cell (pr21 q)
  (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone · (π₁ · f))
binprod_1cell q binprod_cone_in_slice

B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧

B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)

Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
q: binprod_cone (x,, f) (y,, g)
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 q)
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q)))
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))): pb_cone f g

           (pb_ump_mor_pr1 Hpb other_cone))))
  (rassociator_invertible_2cell
     (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone) 
     (pb_cone_pr1 cone) (pr2 (x,, f))): invertible_2cell (pr21 q)
  (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone · (π₁ · f))
invertible_2cell
  (?φ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice)
  (binprod_cone_pr1 q)

     (pb_cone_pr1 cone) (pr2 (x,, f))): invertible_2cell (pr21 q)

B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
q: binprod_cone (x,, f) (y,, g)
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 q)
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q)))
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))): pb_cone f g

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pr2 (x,, f))
        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (pb_ump_mor_pr1 Hpb other_cone))))
  (rassociator_invertible_2cell
     (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone) 
     (pb_cone_pr1 cone) (pr2 (x,, f))): invertible_2cell (pr21 q)
  (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone · (π₁ · f))
(λ f0 : B ⟦ pr1 q, pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice ⟧,
 pr2 q -->[ f0] pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice) 
  ?pr1

        
B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
q: binprod_cone (x,, f) (y,, g)
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 q)
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q)))
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))): pb_cone f g
φ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pr2 (x,, f))
        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (pb_ump_mor_pr1 Hpb other_cone))))
  (rassociator_invertible_2cell
     (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone) 
     (pb_cone_pr1 cone) (pr2 (x,, f))): invertible_2cell (pr21 q)
  (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone · (π₁ · f))
B ⟦ pr1 q, pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice ⟧
 exact (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone).
        
B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
q: binprod_cone (x,, f) (y,, g)
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 q)
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q)))
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))): pb_cone f g
φ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pr2 (x,, f))
        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (pb_ump_mor_pr1 Hpb other_cone))))
  (rassociator_invertible_2cell
     (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone) 
     (pb_cone_pr1 cone) (pr2 (x,, f))): invertible_2cell (pr21 q)
  (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone · (π₁ · f))
(λ f0 : B ⟦ pr1 q, pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice ⟧,
 pr2 q -->[ f0] pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice)
  (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone)
 exact φ.

     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))): pb_cone f g

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell

     (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone) 
     (pb_cone_pr1 cone) (pr2 (x,, f))): invertible_2cell (pr21 q)
  (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone · (π₁ · f))
invertible_2cell
  ((pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone,, φ)
   · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice)
  (binprod_cone_pr1 q)
 
B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
q: binprod_cone (x,, f) (y,, g)
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 q)
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q)))
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))): pb_cone f g
φ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pr2 (x,, f))
        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (pb_ump_mor_pr1 Hpb other_cone))))
  (rassociator_invertible_2cell
     (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone) 
     (pb_cone_pr1 cone) (pr2 (x,, f))): invertible_2cell (pr21 q)
  (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone · (π₁ · f))
(pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone,, φ)
· binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>
binprod_cone_pr1 q

  (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone · (π₁ · f))
is_invertible_2cell ?η

f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧

Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
q: binprod_cone (x,, f) (y,, g)

  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q)))
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))): pb_cone f g

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell

  (rassociator_invertible_2cell

     (pb_cone_pr1 cone) (pr2 (x,, f))): invertible_2cell (pr21 q)
  (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone · (π₁ · f))

  ((pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone,, φ)
   · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice) ==>

B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
q: binprod_cone (x,, f) (y,, g)
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 q)
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q)))
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))): pb_cone f g
φ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pr2 (x,, f))
        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (pb_ump_mor_pr1 Hpb other_cone))))
  (rassociator_invertible_2cell
     (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone) 
     (pb_cone_pr1 cone) (pr2 (x,, f))): invertible_2cell (pr21 q)
  (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone · (π₁ · f))
(λ η : pr1
         ((pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone,, φ)
          · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice) ==>
       pr1 (binprod_cone_pr1 q),
 disp_2cells η
   (pr2
      ((pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone,, φ)
       · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice))
   (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))) 
  ?pr1

          
B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
q: binprod_cone (x,, f) (y,, g)
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 q)
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q)))
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))): pb_cone f g
φ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pr2 (x,, f))
        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (pb_ump_mor_pr1 Hpb other_cone))))
  (rassociator_invertible_2cell
     (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone) 
     (pb_cone_pr1 cone) (pr2 (x,, f))): invertible_2cell (pr21 q)
  (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone · (π₁ · f))
pr1
  ((pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone,, φ)
   · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice) ==>
pr1 (binprod_cone_pr1 q)
 exact (pb_ump_mor_pr1 Hpb other_cone).
          
B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
q: binprod_cone (x,, f) (y,, g)
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 q)
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q)))
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))): pb_cone f g
φ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pr2 (x,, f))
        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (pb_ump_mor_pr1 Hpb other_cone))))
  (rassociator_invertible_2cell
     (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone) 
     (pb_cone_pr1 cone) (pr2 (x,, f))): invertible_2cell (pr21 q)
  (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone · (π₁ · f))
(λ η : pr1
         ((pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone,, φ)
          · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice) ==>
       pr1 (binprod_cone_pr1 q),
 disp_2cells η
   (pr2
      ((pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone,, φ)
       · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice))
   (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q)))
  (pb_ump_mor_pr1 Hpb other_cone)
 abstract
              (cbn ;
               rewrite lwhisker_id2, id2_left ;
               rewrite !vassocl ;
               rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ • (_ • z)) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
               rewrite rassociator_lassociator ;
               rewrite id2_left ;
               rewrite rwhisker_vcomp ;
               rewrite vcomp_linv ;
               rewrite id2_rwhisker ;
               apply id2_right).
        
B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
q: binprod_cone (x,, f) (y,, g)
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 q)
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q)))
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))): pb_cone f g
φ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pr2 (x,, f))
        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (pb_ump_mor_pr1 Hpb other_cone))))
  (rassociator_invertible_2cell
     (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone) 
     (pb_cone_pr1 cone) (pr2 (x,, f))): invertible_2cell (pr21 q)
  (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone · (π₁ · f))
is_invertible_2cell
  (pb_ump_mor_pr1 Hpb other_cone,,
   binprod_1_ump_in_slice_cell_subproof)
 
B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
q: binprod_cone (x,, f) (y,, g)
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 q)
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q)))
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))): pb_cone f g
φ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pr2 (x,, f))
        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (pb_ump_mor_pr1 Hpb other_cone))))
  (rassociator_invertible_2cell
     (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone) 
     (pb_cone_pr1 cone) (pr2 (x,, f))): invertible_2cell (pr21 q)
  (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone · (π₁ · f))
is_invertible_2cell
  (pr1
     (pb_ump_mor_pr1 Hpb other_cone,,
      binprod_1_ump_in_slice_cell_subproof))

          apply property_from_invertible_2cell.

B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
q: binprod_cone (x,, f) (y,, g)
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 q)
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q)))
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))): pb_cone f g
φ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pr2 (x,, f))
        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (pb_ump_mor_pr1 Hpb other_cone))))
  (rassociator_invertible_2cell
     (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone) 
     (pb_cone_pr1 cone) (pr2 (x,, f))): invertible_2cell (pr21 q)
  (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone · (π₁ · f))
pr1
  ((pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone,, φ)
   · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice) ==>
pr1 (binprod_cone_pr2 q)
 exact (pb_ump_mor_pr2 Hpb other_cone).
          
B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
q: binprod_cone (x,, f) (y,, g)
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 q)
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q)))
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))): pb_cone f g
φ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pr2 (x,, f))
        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (pb_ump_mor_pr1 Hpb other_cone))))
  (rassociator_invertible_2cell
     (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone) 
     (pb_cone_pr1 cone) (pr2 (x,, f))): invertible_2cell (pr21 q)
  (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone · (π₁ · f))
(λ η : pr1
         ((pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone,, φ)
          · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice) ==>
       pr1 (binprod_cone_pr2 q),
 disp_2cells η
   (pr2
      ((pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone,, φ)
       · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice))
   (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr2 q)))
  (pb_ump_mor_pr2 Hpb other_cone)
 exact binprod_1_ump_in_slice_cell_eq.
        
B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
q: binprod_cone (x,, f) (y,, g)
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 q)
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q)))
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))): pb_cone f g
φ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pr2 (x,, f))
        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (pb_ump_mor_pr1 Hpb other_cone))))
  (rassociator_invertible_2cell
     (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone) 
     (pb_cone_pr1 cone) (pr2 (x,, f))): invertible_2cell (pr21 q)
  (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone · (π₁ · f))
is_invertible_2cell
  (pb_ump_mor_pr2 Hpb other_cone,,
   binprod_1_ump_in_slice_cell_eq)
 
B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
q: binprod_cone (x,, f) (y,, g)
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 q)
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
  (pr1 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q)))
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr2 q))): pb_cone f g
φ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q))
     (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pr2 (x,, f))
        (inv_of_invertible_2cell
           (pb_ump_mor_pr1 Hpb other_cone))))
  (rassociator_invertible_2cell
     (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone) 
     (pb_cone_pr1 cone) (pr2 (x,, f))): invertible_2cell (pr21 q)
  (pb_ump_mor Hpb other_cone · (π₁ · f))
is_invertible_2cell
  (pr1
     (pb_ump_mor_pr2 Hpb other_cone,,
      binprod_1_ump_in_slice_cell_eq))

          apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
    Defined.
  End BinProdUmp1.

  Definition binprod_1_ump_in_slice
    : binprod_ump_1 binprod_cone_in_slice
    := λ q, binprod_1_ump_in_slice_cell q.

  Section BinProdUmp2.
    Context {h : slice_bicat b}
            {φ ψ : h --> binprod_cone_in_slice}
            (α : φ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice
                 ==>
                 ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice)
            (β : φ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice
                 ==>
                 ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice).

    
B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
h: slice_bicat b
φ, ψ: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, binprod_cone_in_slice ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>
ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>
ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice
isaprop
  (∑ χ : φ ==> ψ,
   χ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice = α
   × χ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice = β)

cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g

h: slice_bicat b

ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>
ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice
isaprop
  (∑ χ : φ ==> ψ,
   χ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice = α
   × χ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice = β)

β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>
ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice

  (∑ χ : φ ==> ψ,
   χ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice = α
   × χ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice = β)

isaprop
  (x0 ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice = α
   × x0 ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice = β)

        apply isapropdirprod ; apply cellset_property.

pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧

π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧

β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>
ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice

× χ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice = β
pr1 φ · pb_cone_pr2 cone ==> pr1 ψ · pb_cone_pr2 cone
B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
h: slice_bicat b
φ, ψ: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, binprod_cone_in_slice ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>
ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>
ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice
χ₁, χ₂: ∑ χ : φ ==> ψ,
χ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice = α
× χ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice = β
(((pr1 φ ◃ pb_cone_cell cone)
  • lassociator (pr1 φ) (pb_cone_pr2 cone) g)
 • (?β ▹ g))
• rassociator (pr1 ψ) (pb_cone_pr2 cone) g =
((lassociator (pr1 φ) (pb_cone_pr1 cone) f • (?α ▹ f))
 • rassociator (pr1 ψ) (pb_cone_pr1 cone) f)
• (pr1 ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell cone)

pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧

π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g

χ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice = α
× χ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice = β
pr11 χ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone = ?α

β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>

χ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice = α
× χ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice = β
pr11 χ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone = ?α

pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧

cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
h: slice_bicat b
φ, ψ: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, binprod_cone_in_slice ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>
ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>
ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice
χ₁, χ₂: ∑ χ : φ ==> ψ,
χ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice = α
× χ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice = β
pr11 χ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 cone = ?β

φ, ψ: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, binprod_cone_in_slice ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>
ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice

ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice
χ₁, χ₂: ∑ χ : φ ==> ψ,
χ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice = α
× χ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice = β
pr1 φ · pb_cone_pr1 cone ==> pr1 ψ · pb_cone_pr1 cone
 exact (pr1 α).

h: slice_bicat b
φ, ψ: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, binprod_cone_in_slice ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>
ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>
ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice

χ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice = α
× χ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice = β
(((pr1 φ ◃ pb_cone_cell cone)
  • lassociator (pr1 φ) (pb_cone_pr2 cone) g)
 • (pr1 β ▹ g))
• rassociator (pr1 ψ) (pb_cone_pr2 cone) g =
((lassociator (pr1 φ) (pb_cone_pr1 cone) f
  • (pr1 α ▹ f))
 • rassociator (pr1 ψ) (pb_cone_pr1 cone) f)
• (pr1 ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell cone)

 • rassociator (pr1 ψ) π₁ f) • (pr1 ψ ◃ γ)

g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧

π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
h: slice_bicat b
φ, ψ: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, binprod_cone_in_slice ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>
ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>
ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice
χ₁, χ₂: ∑ χ : φ ==> ψ,
χ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice = α
× χ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice = β
((pr2 ψ • (pr1 ψ ◃ γ)) • lassociator (pr1 ψ) π₂ g)
• rassociator (pr1 ψ) π₂ g =
((pr2 ψ • lassociator (pr1 ψ) π₁ f)
 • rassociator (pr1 ψ) π₁ f) • (pr1 ψ ◃ γ)

π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧

ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice

χ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice = α
× χ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice = β
pr2 ψ
• ((pr1 ψ ◃ γ)
   • (lassociator (pr1 ψ) π₂ g
      • rassociator (pr1 ψ) π₂ g)) =
pr2 ψ
• (lassociator (pr1 ψ) π₁ f
   • (rassociator (pr1 ψ) π₁ f • (pr1 ψ ◃ γ)))

π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧

h: slice_bicat b
φ, ψ: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, binprod_cone_in_slice ⟧

ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice

× χ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice = β
pr11 χ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone = pr1 α
 exact (maponpaths pr1 (pr12 χ₁)).

h: slice_bicat b

α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>

β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>

(λ η : pr1 φ ==> pr1 ψ, disp_2cells η (pr2 φ) (pr2 ψ))
  ?pr1

      
B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
h: slice_bicat b
φ, ψ: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, binprod_cone_in_slice ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>
ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice

pr1 φ ==> pr1 ψ
 
B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
h: slice_bicat b
φ, ψ: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, binprod_cone_in_slice ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>
ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>
ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice
(((pr1 φ ◃ γ) • lassociator (pr1 φ) π₂ g)
 • (pr1 β ▹ g)) • rassociator (pr1 ψ) π₂ g =
((lassociator (pr1 φ) π₁ f • (pr1 α ▹ f))
 • rassociator (pr1 ψ) π₁ f) • (pr1 ψ ◃ γ)

        abstract
          (pose (r₁ := pr2 α) ;
           pose (r₂ := pr2 β) ;
           cbn in r₁, r₂ ;
           rewrite !lwhisker_id2, !id2_left in r₁ ;
           use (vcomp_lcancel (pr12 φ)) ; [ apply property_from_invertible_2cell | ] ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           rewrite !vassocr in r₂ ;
           refine (maponpaths (λ z, z • _) r₂ @ _) ; clear r₂ ;
           refine (_ @ maponpaths (λ z, (z • _) • _) (!r₁)) ; clear r₁ ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           rewrite lassociator_rassociator, id2_right ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           rewrite lassociator_rassociator, id2_left ;
           apply idpath).
      
B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
h: slice_bicat b
φ, ψ: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, binprod_cone_in_slice ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>
ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>
ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice
(λ η : pr1 φ ==> pr1 ψ, disp_2cells η (pr2 φ) (pr2 ψ))
  (pb_ump_cell Hpb (pr1 φ) (pr1 ψ) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
     (binprod_2_ump_in_slice_cell_subproof
      :
      (((pr1 φ ◃ pb_cone_cell cone)
        • lassociator (pr1 φ) (pb_cone_pr2 cone) g)
       • (pr1 β ▹ g))
      • rassociator (pr1 ψ) (pb_cone_pr2 cone) g =
      ((lassociator (pr1 φ) (pb_cone_pr1 cone) f
        • (pr1 α ▹ f))
       • rassociator (pr1 ψ) (pb_cone_pr1 cone) f)
      • (pr1 ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell cone)))
 abstract
          (cbn ;
           use (vcomp_rcancel (lassociator _ _ _)) ; [ is_iso | ] ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite <- rwhisker_rwhisker ;
           rewrite (pb_ump_cell_pr1 Hpb) ;
           pose (pr2 α) as r ;
           cbn in r ;
           rewrite !lwhisker_id2, !id2_left in r ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           exact r).
    Defined.

    
B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
h: slice_bicat b
φ, ψ: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, binprod_cone_in_slice ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>
ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>
ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice
binprod_2_ump_in_slice_cell
▹ binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice = α

    
B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧

α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>

binprod_2_ump_in_slice_cell
▹ binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice = α

      
B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧

cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g

h: slice_bicat b
φ, ψ: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, binprod_cone_in_slice ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>
ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>
ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice
(pb_ump_cell Hpb (pr1 φ) (pr1 ψ) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
   binprod_2_ump_in_slice_cell_subproof,,
 binprod_2_ump_in_slice_cell_subproof0)
▹ binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice = α

      
B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
h: slice_bicat b
φ, ψ: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, binprod_cone_in_slice ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>
ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>
ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice
pr1
  ((pb_ump_cell Hpb (pr1 φ) (pr1 ψ) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
      binprod_2_ump_in_slice_cell_subproof,,
    binprod_2_ump_in_slice_cell_subproof0)
   ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice) = pr1 α

      
B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
h: slice_bicat b
φ, ψ: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, binprod_cone_in_slice ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>
ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>
ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice
pb_ump_cell Hpb (pr1 φ) (pr1 ψ) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
  binprod_2_ump_in_slice_cell_subproof ▹ π₁ = pr1 α

      apply (pb_ump_cell_pr1 Hpb).
    Qed.

    
B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
π₁: B ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g
Hpb: has_pb_ump cone
h: slice_bicat b
φ, ψ: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, binprod_cone_in_slice ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>
ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>
ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice
binprod_2_ump_in_slice_cell
▹ binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice = β

π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧

cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g

ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice
(pb_ump_cell Hpb (pr1 φ) (pr1 ψ) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
   binprod_2_ump_in_slice_cell_subproof,,
 binprod_2_ump_in_slice_cell_subproof0)
▹ binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice = β

pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧

π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)

h: slice_bicat b
φ, ψ: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, binprod_cone_in_slice ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>
ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>
ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice
pr1
  ((pb_ump_cell Hpb (pr1 φ) (pr1 ψ) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
      binprod_2_ump_in_slice_cell_subproof,,
    binprod_2_ump_in_slice_cell_subproof0)
   ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice) = pr1 β

      
B: bicat
pb, x, y, b: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, b ⟧

π₂: B ⟦ pb, y ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (π₁ · f) (π₂ · g)
cone:= make_pb_cone pb π₁ π₂ γ: pb_cone f g

h: slice_bicat b
φ, ψ: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, binprod_cone_in_slice ⟧
α: φ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>
ψ · binprod_cone_pr1 binprod_cone_in_slice
β: φ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice ==>
ψ · binprod_cone_pr2 binprod_cone_in_slice
pb_ump_cell Hpb (pr1 φ) (pr1 ψ) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
  binprod_2_ump_in_slice_cell_subproof ▹ π₂ = pr1 β

      apply (pb_ump_cell_pr2 Hpb).
    Qed.
  End BinProdUmp2.

b: B
has_binprod (slice_bicat b)

B: bicat
pb_B: has_pb B
b: B
f₁, f₂: slice_bicat b
∑ p : binprod_cone f₁ f₂, has_binprod_ump p

  exact (_ ,, binprod_ump_in_slice _ _ _ _ _ (pr2 (pb_B _ _ _ (pr2 f₁) (pr2 f₂)))).
Defined.

(**
 3. Inserters

 We construct inserters in the slice bicategory by using both inserters
 and equifiers in the base. We need to take an equifier to guarantee
 that the obtained 2-cell, satisfies a coherency.
 *)
Section InsertersSlice.
  Context {B : bicat}
          (ins_B : has_inserters B)
          (eq_B : has_equifiers B)
          {b : B}
          {h₁ h₂ : slice_bicat b}
          (α β : h₁ --> h₂).

  Let I : B
    := pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)).
  Let p : I --> pr1 h₁
    := pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)).
  Let γ : p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
    := pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)).
  Let I_cone : inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
    := make_inserter_cone I p γ.
  Let HI : has_inserter_ump I_cone
    := pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)).

  Let E : B
    := pr1 (eq_B
              I _
              (p · pr2 h₁) (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
              (((p ◃ pr12 α) • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)) • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
              ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))).
  Let p' : E --> I
    := pr12 (eq_B
               I _
               (p · pr2 h₁) (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
               (((p ◃ pr12 α) • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)) • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
               ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))).
  Let path : p' ◃ _ = p' ◃ _
    := pr122 (eq_B
                I _
                (p · pr2 h₁) (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
                (((p ◃ pr12 α) • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)) • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
                ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))).
  Let E_cone : equifier_cone _ _ _ _
    := make_equifier_cone E p' path.
  Let HE : has_equifier_ump E_cone
    := pr222 (eq_B
                I _
                (p · pr2 h₁) (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
                (((p ◃ pr12 α) • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)) • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
                ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))).

  
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
slice_bicat b

  
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone

b: B

p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β

  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)

   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)

          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone

           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
invertible_2cell (pr2 inserter_slice) (?g · pr2 h₁)

    
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧

p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
B ⟦ pr1 inserter_slice, pr1 h₁ ⟧
 exact (p'· p).
    
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧

p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β

E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
invertible_2cell (pr2 inserter_slice)
  (p' · p · pr2 h₁)
 apply id2_invertible_2cell.
  Defined.

  Definition inserter_slice_cell_cell
    : p' · p · pr1 α ==> p' · p · pr1 β
    := rassociator _ _ _ • (p' ◃ γ) • lassociator _ _ _.

(id₂ (p' · p · pr2 h₁)
 • ((p' · p ◃ pr2 α)
    • lassociator (p' · p) (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)))

ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B

α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧

p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β

  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)

    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'

   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)

((p' · p ◃ pr2 α)
 • lassociator (p' · p) (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
• (((rassociator p' p (pr1 α) • (p' ◃ γ))
    • lassociator p' p (pr1 β)) ▹ pr2 h₂) =
(p' · p ◃ pr2 β)
• lassociator (p' · p) (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)

ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧

p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B

        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)

        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
((p' · p ◃ pr2 α)
 • lassociator (p' · p) (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
• (((rassociator p' p (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
    • ((p' ◃ γ) ▹ pr2 h₂))
   • (lassociator p' p (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
(p' · p ◃ pr2 β)
• lassociator (p' · p) (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)

    
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
lassociator p' p (pr2 h₁)
• (((p' · p ◃ pr2 α)
    • lassociator (p' · p) (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (((rassociator p' p (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
       • ((p' ◃ γ) ▹ pr2 h₂))
      • (lassociator p' p (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))) =
lassociator p' p (pr2 h₁)
• ((p' · p ◃ pr2 β)
   • lassociator (p' · p) (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

    
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
((((lassociator p' p (pr2 h₁) • (p' · p ◃ pr2 α))
   • lassociator (p' · p) (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
  • (rassociator p' p (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
 • ((p' ◃ γ) ▹ pr2 h₂))
• (lassociator p' p (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂) =
(lassociator p' p (pr2 h₁) • (p' · p ◃ pr2 β))
• lassociator (p' · p) (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)

    
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B

        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
(((((p' ◃ (p ◃ pr2 α))
    • lassociator p' p (pr1 α · pr2 h₂))
   • lassociator (p' · p) (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
  • (rassociator p' p (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
 • ((p' ◃ γ) ▹ pr2 h₂))
• (lassociator p' p (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂) =
((p' ◃ (p ◃ pr2 β))
 • lassociator p' p (pr1 β · pr2 h₂))
• lassociator (p' · p) (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)

    
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B

  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)

          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
(p' ◃ (p ◃ pr2 α))
• (lassociator p' p (pr1 α · pr2 h₂)
   • (lassociator (p' · p) (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator p' p (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • (((p' ◃ γ) ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • (lassociator p' p (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))))) =
(p' ◃ (p ◃ pr2 β))
• (lassociator p' p (pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
   • lassociator (p' · p) (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

• (lassociator p' p (pr1 α · pr2 h₂)
   • (lassociator (p' · p) (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator p' p (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)

            • (lassociator p' p (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))))) =

B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
?b =
(p' ◃ (p ◃ pr2 β))
• (lassociator p' p (pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
   • lassociator (p' · p) (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

ins_B: has_inserters B

b: B

  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)

    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
(p' ◃ (p ◃ pr2 α))
• (lassociator p' p (pr1 α · pr2 h₂)
   • (lassociator (p' · p) (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)
      • ((rassociator p' p (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • (((p' ◃ γ) ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • (lassociator p' p (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))))) =
?b

ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧

p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β

E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
lassociator p' p (pr1 α · pr2 h₂)
• (lassociator (p' · p) (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)
   • ((rassociator p' p (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • (((p' ◃ γ) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • (lassociator p' p (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)))) =
?t2

      
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
(((lassociator p' p (pr1 α · pr2 h₂)
   • lassociator (p' · p) (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
  • (rassociator p' p (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
 • ((p' ◃ γ) ▹ pr2 h₂))
• (lassociator p' p (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂) = ?t2

          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'

    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'

   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

(((((p' ◃ lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
    • lassociator p' (p · pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (lassociator p' p (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
  • (rassociator p' p (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))

• (lassociator p' p (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂) = ?t2

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
(lassociator p' p (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
• ((rassociator p' p (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • (((p' ◃ γ) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • (lassociator p' p (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))) = ?t20

        
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
(((lassociator p' p (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
  • (rassociator p' p (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
 • ((p' ◃ γ) ▹ pr2 h₂))
• (lassociator p' p (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂) = ?t20

        
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧

p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β

HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
(((lassociator p' p (pr1 α) • rassociator p' p (pr1 α))
  ▹ pr2 h₂) • ((p' ◃ γ) ▹ pr2 h₂))
• (lassociator p' p (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂) = ?t20

ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B

  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)

      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)

          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)

   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
((id₂ (p' · (p · pr1 α)) ▹ pr2 h₂)
 • ((p' ◃ γ) ▹ pr2 h₂))
• (lassociator p' p (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂) = ?t20

  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
(p' ◃ lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
• (lassociator p' (p · pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)
   • (((p' ◃ γ) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • (lassociator p' p (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))) = ?t2
