          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
(lassociator p' (p · pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)
 • ((p' ◃ γ) ▹ pr2 h₂))
• (lassociator p' p (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
((p' ◃ (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
 • lassociator p' (p · pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
• (lassociator p' p (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂) = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
(p' ◃ (p ◃ pr2 α))
• ((p' ◃ lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (((p' ◃ (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
       • lassociator p' (p · pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
      • (lassociator p' p (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))) =
(p' ◃ (p ◃ pr2 β))
• (lassociator p' p (pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
   • lassociator (p' · p) (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

    
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
((((p' ◃ (p ◃ pr2 α))
   • (p' ◃ lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)))
  • (p' ◃ (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)))
 • lassociator p' (p · pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
• (lassociator p' p (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂) =
((p' ◃ (p ◃ pr2 β))
 • lassociator p' p (pr1 β · pr2 h₂))
• lassociator (p' · p) (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)

   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'

   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)

((p'
  ◃ (((p ◃ pr2 α) • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
     • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)))
 • lassociator p' (p · pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧

p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
(p'
 ◃ ((p ◃ pr2 α)
    • (lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂) • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))))
• (lassociator p' (p · pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
   • (lassociator p' p (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
(p' ◃ (p ◃ pr2 β))
• (lassociator p' p (pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
   • lassociator (p' · p) (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧

p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β

E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)

      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
(p'
 ◃ ((p ◃ pr2 α)
    • (lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂) • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))))
• (lassociator p' (p · pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
   • (lassociator p' p (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)) = ?b
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
?b =
(p' ◃ (p ◃ pr2 β))
• (lassociator p' p (pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
   • lassociator (p' · p) (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

    
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
(p'
 ◃ ((p ◃ pr2 α)
    • (lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂) • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))))
• (lassociator p' (p · pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
   • (lassociator p' p (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)) = ?b

  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)

          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'

    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)

   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr2 α)
   • (lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂) • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))) =
?y'

p'

  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

      apply path.
    
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
(p' ◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)))
• (lassociator p' (p · pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
   • (lassociator p' p (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
(p' ◃ (p ◃ pr2 β))
• (lassociator p' p (pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
   • lassociator (p' · p) (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

    
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧

p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
((p' ◃ (p ◃ pr12 β))
 • (p' ◃ lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)))
• (lassociator p' (p · pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
   • (lassociator p' p (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
(p' ◃ (p ◃ pr2 β))
• (lassociator p' p (pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
   • lassociator (p' · p) (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

    
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧

p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B

        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)

         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
(p' ◃ (p ◃ pr12 β))
• ((p' ◃ lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
   • (lassociator p' (p · pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
      • (lassociator p' p (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))) =
(p' ◃ (p ◃ pr2 β))
• (lassociator p' p (pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
   • lassociator (p' · p) (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

    
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
(p' ◃ lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
• (lassociator p' (p · pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)
   • (lassociator p' p (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
lassociator p' p (pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
• lassociator (p' · p) (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)

E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
((p' ◃ lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
 • lassociator p' (p · pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
• (lassociator p' p (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂) =
lassociator p' p (pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
• lassociator (p' · p) (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)

    apply lassociator_lassociator.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone

  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'

  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)

  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

cell_slice_homot (inserter_slice_pr1 · α)
  (inserter_slice_pr1 · β) inserter_slice_cell_cell
 exact inserter_slice_cell_homot.
  Defined.

  Let cone : inserter_cone α β
    := make_inserter_cone
         inserter_slice
         inserter_slice_pr1
         inserter_slice_cell.

  Section InserterSliceUMP1.
    Context (q : inserter_cone α β).

ins_B: has_inserters B

b: B

γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β

E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)

         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'

   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)

   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β
B ⟦ pr11 q, I ⟧

eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B

γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β

E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β
B ⟦ pr11 q, I ⟧

      
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β
B ⟦ pr11 q, pr1 h₁ ⟧

   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'

          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone

eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B

α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)

         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β

α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β
((((pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q) ◃ pr12 α)
   • ((inserter_ump_mor_pr1 HI
         (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
         (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q))) ^-1
      ▹ pr1 α · pr2 h₂))
  • rassociator inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_to_ins p
      (pr1 α · pr2 h₂))
 • (inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_to_ins
    ◃ lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)))
• (inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_to_ins ◃ (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
(((pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q) ◃ pr12 β)
  • ((inserter_ump_mor_pr1 HI
        (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
        (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q))) ^-1
     ▹ pr1 β · pr2 h₂))
 • rassociator inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_to_ins p
     (pr1 β · pr2 h₂))
• (inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_to_ins
   ◃ lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)

p'

        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)

          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'

    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))

  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β

       pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q · β),

B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone

  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β

     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'

b: B

γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β

         (((p ◃ pr12 α)

          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)

b: B

p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β

         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)

• ((pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q) ◃ pr2 β)
   • lassociator (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
       (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
((lassociator (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q)) (pr1 β)
    (pr2 h₂)

         (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
         (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q))) ^-1 ▹ pr1 β)
     ▹ pr2 h₂))

      (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
• rassociator inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_to_ins
    (p · pr1 β) (pr2 h₂) = ?t2

        apply idpath.

γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β

  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)

          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'

    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'

α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β
m:= pr2 (inserter_cone_cell q): (pr2 (inserter_cone_pr1 q)
 • ((pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q) ◃ pr2 α)
    • lassociator (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
        (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)))
• (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q) ▹ pr2 h₂) =
pr2 (inserter_cone_pr1 q)
• ((pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q) ◃ pr2 β)
   • lassociator (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
       (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
(pr12 (inserter_cone_pr1 q)
 • (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q) ◃ pr12 β))
• lassociator (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q)) (pr1 β)
    (pr2 h₂) = ?y'

        
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β
m:= pr2 (inserter_cone_cell q): (pr2 (inserter_cone_pr1 q)
 • ((pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q) ◃ pr2 α)
    • lassociator (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
        (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)))
• (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q) ▹ pr2 h₂) =
pr2 (inserter_cone_pr1 q)
• ((pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q) ◃ pr2 β)
   • lassociator (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
       (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
pr12 (inserter_cone_pr1 q)
• ((pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q) ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q)) (pr1 β)
       (pr2 h₂)) = ?y'

        exact (!m).
      
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β
m:= pr2 (inserter_cone_cell q): (pr2 (inserter_cone_pr1 q)
 • ((pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q) ◃ pr2 α)
    • lassociator (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
        (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)))
• (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q) ▹ pr2 h₂) =
pr2 (inserter_cone_pr1 q)
• ((pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q) ◃ pr2 β)
   • lassociator (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
       (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
((((pr2 (inserter_cone_pr1 q)
    • ((pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q) ◃ pr2 α)
       • lassociator (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
           (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)))
   • (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q) ▹ pr2 h₂))
  • (((inserter_ump_mor_pr1 HI
         (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
         (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q))) ^-1 ▹ pr1 β)
     ▹ pr2 h₂))
 • (rassociator inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_to_ins p
      (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂))
• rassociator inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_to_ins
    (p · pr1 β) (pr2 h₂) =
(((((pr12 (inserter_cone_pr1 q)
     • (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q) ◃ pr12 α))
    • lassociator (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q)) (pr1 α)
        (pr2 h₂))
   • (((inserter_ump_mor_pr1 HI
          (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
          (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q))) ^-1 ▹ pr1 α)
      ▹ pr2 h₂))
  • (rassociator inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_to_ins p
       (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂))
 • rassociator inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_to_ins
     (p · pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
• (inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_to_ins ◃ (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

      
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β
m:= pr2 (inserter_cone_cell q): (pr2 (inserter_cone_pr1 q)
 • ((pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q) ◃ pr2 α)
    • lassociator (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
        (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)))
• (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q) ▹ pr2 h₂) =
pr2 (inserter_cone_pr1 q)
• ((pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q) ◃ pr2 β)
   • lassociator (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
       (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
pr2 (inserter_cone_pr1 q)
• ((pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q) ◃ pr2 α)
   • (lassociator (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q)) (pr1 α)
        (pr2 h₂)
      • ((pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((((inserter_ump_mor_pr1 HI
                 (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
                 (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q))) ^-1
              ▹ pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • ((rassociator
                  inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_to_ins p
                  (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
               • rassociator
                   inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_to_ins
                   (p · pr1 β) (pr2 h₂)))))) =
pr12 (inserter_cone_pr1 q)
• ((pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q) ◃ pr12 α)
   • (lassociator (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q)) (pr1 α)
        (pr2 h₂)
      • ((((inserter_ump_mor_pr1 HI
              (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
              (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q))) ^-1
           ▹ pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
         • ((rassociator
               inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_to_ins p
               (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
            • (rassociator
                 inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_to_ins
                 (p · pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)
               • (inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_to_ins
                  ◃ (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)))))))

      
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧

p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)

         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β
m:= pr2 (inserter_cone_cell q): (pr2 (inserter_cone_pr1 q)
 • ((pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q) ◃ pr2 α)
    • lassociator (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
        (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)))
• (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q) ▹ pr2 h₂) =
pr2 (inserter_cone_pr1 q)
• ((pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q) ◃ pr2 β)
   • lassociator (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
       (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
(pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q) ▹ pr2 h₂)
• ((((inserter_ump_mor_pr1 HI
        (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
        (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q))) ^-1 ▹ pr1 β)
    ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • ((rassociator inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_to_ins p
         (pr1 β) ▹ pr2 h₂)
      • rassociator inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_to_ins
          (p · pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))) =
(((inserter_ump_mor_pr1 HI (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
     (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q))) ^-1 ▹ pr1 α)
 ▹ pr2 h₂)
• ((rassociator inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_to_ins p
      (pr1 α) ▹ pr2 h₂)
   • (rassociator inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_to_ins
        (p · pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)
      • (inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_to_ins
         ◃ (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))))

ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B

γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β

HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))

b: B

γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β

          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)

  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β
m:= pr2 (inserter_cone_cell q): (pr2 (inserter_cone_pr1 q)
 • ((pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q) ◃ pr2 α)
    • lassociator (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
        (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)))
• (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q) ▹ pr2 h₂) =
pr2 (inserter_cone_pr1 q)
• ((pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q) ◃ pr2 β)
   • lassociator (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
       (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
?b = pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)

b: B

          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'

    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'

   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β

?b = pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)

◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone

  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β
m:= pr2 (inserter_cone_cell q): (pr2 (inserter_cone_pr1 q)

    • lassociator (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
        (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)))

pr2 (inserter_cone_pr1 q)

       (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
((inserter_ump_mor_pr1 HI (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))

• ((inserter_ump_mor_pr1 HI
      (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
      (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)) ▹ pr1 α)
   • pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)) =

          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'

    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β
m:= pr2 (inserter_cone_cell q): (pr2 (inserter_cone_pr1 q)
 • ((pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q) ◃ pr2 α)
    • lassociator (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
        (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂)))
• (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q) ▹ pr2 h₂) =
pr2 (inserter_cone_pr1 q)
• ((pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q) ◃ pr2 β)
   • lassociator (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
       (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
id₂ (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q) · pr1 α)
• pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q) =
pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)

      apply id2_left.
    Qed.

E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)

          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'

  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)

   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β
B ⟦ pr11 q, E ⟧

α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β
B ⟦ pr11 q, I ⟧

         (((p ◃ pr12 α)

          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)

  ((p ◃ pr12 β)

         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β
is_invertible_2cell ?η

      
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β
pr21 q ==>
inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_to_eq · (p' · p · pr2 h₁)
 exact (pr12 (inserter_cone_pr1 q)
               • ((inserter_ump_mor_pr1 HI _ _)^-1 ▹ _)
               • ((equifier_ump_mor_pr1 HE _ _)^-1 ▹ _ ▹ _)
               • (rassociator _ _ _ ▹ _)
               • rassociator _ _ _).
      
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B

b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧

p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧

HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))

        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)

         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))

cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β
is_invertible_2cell
  ((((pr12 (inserter_cone_pr1 q)
      • ((inserter_ump_mor_pr1 HI
            (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
            (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q))) ^-1 ▹ pr2 h₁))
     • (((equifier_ump_mor_pr1 HE
            (inserter_ump_mor HI
               (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
               (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)))
            inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_path) ^-1
         ▹ inserter_cone_pr1 I_cone) ▹ pr2 h₁))
    • (rassociator
         (equifier_ump_mor HE
            (inserter_ump_mor HI
               (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
               (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)))
            inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_path)
         (equifier_cone_pr1 E_cone)
         (inserter_cone_pr1 I_cone) ▹ pr2 h₁))
   • rassociator
       (equifier_ump_mor HE
          (inserter_ump_mor HI
             (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
             (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)))
          inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_path)
       (equifier_cone_pr1 E_cone
        · inserter_cone_pr1 I_cone) (pr2 h₁))

  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)

    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'

   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)

  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β

        apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
    Defined.

          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β
invertible_2cell (pr2 q) (?g · pr2 cone)

ins_B: has_inserters B

b: B

p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)

         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β
B ⟦ pr1 q, pr1 cone ⟧
 exact inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_to_eq.

b: B

  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)

         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β
invertible_2cell (pr2 q)
  (inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_to_eq · pr2 cone)
 exact inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_inv2cell.
    Defined.

    Definition inserter_ump_1_slice_pr1_cell_cell
      : inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_to_eq · (p' · p)
        ==>
        pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q)
      := lassociator _ _ _
         • (equifier_ump_mor_pr1 HE _ _ ▹ _)
         • inserter_ump_mor_pr1 HI _ _.

(((((pr12 (inserter_cone_pr1 q)
     • ((inserter_ump_mor_pr1 HI

      (pr2 h₁))

     ◃ id₂ (p' · p · pr2 h₁))

• (((inserter_ump_mor_pr1 HI

ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β
pr12 (inserter_cone_pr1 q)
• (((inserter_ump_mor_pr1 HI
       (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
       (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q))) ^-1 ▹ pr2 h₁)
   • ((((equifier_ump_mor_pr1 HE
           (inserter_ump_mor HI
              (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
              (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)))
           inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_path) ^-1 ▹ p)
       ▹ pr2 h₁)
      • ((rassociator
            (equifier_ump_mor HE
               (inserter_ump_mor HI
                  (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
                  (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)))
               inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_path) p' p
          ▹ pr2 h₁)
         • (rassociator
              (equifier_ump_mor HE
                 (inserter_ump_mor HI
                    (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
                    (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)))
                 inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_path)
              (p' · p) (pr2 h₁)
            • (((inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_to_eq
                 ◃ id₂ (p' · p · pr2 h₁))
                • lassociator
                    inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_to_eq
                    (p' · p) (pr2 h₁))
               • (((lassociator
                      (equifier_ump_mor HE
                         (inserter_ump_mor HI
                            (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
                            (pr1
                               (inserter_cone_cell q)))
                         inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_path)
                      p' p
                    • (equifier_ump_mor_pr1 HE
                         (inserter_ump_mor HI
                            (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
                            (pr1
                               (inserter_cone_cell q)))
                         inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_path
                       ▹ p))
                   • inserter_ump_mor_pr1 HI
                       (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
                       (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)))
                  ▹ pr2 h₁)))))) =
pr12 (inserter_cone_pr1 q)
• id₂ (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q) · pr2 h₁)

              (p' · p) (pr2 h₁)
            • (((lassociator
                   (equifier_ump_mor HE
                      (inserter_ump_mor HI
                         (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
                         (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)))
                      inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_path)
                   p' p
                 • (equifier_ump_mor_pr1 HE
                      (inserter_ump_mor HI
                         (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
                         (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)))
                      inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_path
                    ▹ p))
                • inserter_ump_mor_pr1 HI
                    (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
                    (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)))
               ▹ pr2 h₁))))) = ?b
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β
?b = id₂ (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q) · pr2 h₁)

          (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)))
       inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_path ▹ p))
 • inserter_ump_mor_pr1 HI (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
     (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q))) ▹ pr2 h₁ = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)

         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β
((inserter_ump_mor_pr1 HI (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
    (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q))) ^-1 ▹ pr2 h₁)
• ((((equifier_ump_mor_pr1 HE
        (inserter_ump_mor HI
           (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
           (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)))
        inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_path) ^-1 ▹ p)
    ▹ pr2 h₁)
   • ((rassociator
         (equifier_ump_mor HE
            (inserter_ump_mor HI
               (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
               (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)))
            inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_path) p' p
       ▹ pr2 h₁)

             (equifier_ump_mor HE
                (inserter_ump_mor HI
                   (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
                   (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)))
                inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_path) p' p
           • (equifier_ump_mor_pr1 HE
                (inserter_ump_mor HI
                   (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
                   (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)))
                inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_path ▹ p))
          • inserter_ump_mor_pr1 HI
              (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
              (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q))) ▹ pr2 h₁))) =
id₂ (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q) · pr2 h₁)

  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

  ((p ◃ pr12 β)

          (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)))) = ?b
