ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β
((equifier_ump_mor_pr1 HE
    (inserter_ump_mor HI (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
       (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)))
    inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_path) ^-1 ▹ p)
• ((equifier_ump_mor_pr1 HE
      (inserter_ump_mor HI (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
         (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)))
      inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_path ▹ p)
   • inserter_ump_mor_pr1 HI
       (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
       (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q))) = ?t2

q: inserter_cone α β
inserter_ump_1_slice_mor · inserter_slice_pr1 ==>
inserter_cone_pr1 q

    
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β
inserter_ump_1_slice_mor · inserter_slice_pr1 ==>
inserter_cone_pr1 q

path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β
inserter_ump_1_slice_mor · inserter_slice_pr1 ==>
inserter_cone_pr1 q
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β
is_invertible_2cell ?η

eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧

  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)

         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β

inserter_cone_pr1 q

          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'

    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'

   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

  ((p ◃ pr12 β)

B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β
is_invertible_2cell
  ((lassociator
      (equifier_ump_mor HE
         (inserter_ump_mor HI
            (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
            (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)))
         inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_path)
      (equifier_cone_pr1 E_cone)
      (inserter_cone_pr1 I_cone)
    • (equifier_ump_mor_pr1 HE
         (inserter_ump_mor HI
            (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
            (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)))
         inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_path
       ▹ inserter_cone_pr1 I_cone))
   • inserter_ump_mor_pr1 HI
       (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
       (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)))

        is_iso ; apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
    Defined.

    
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β
((inserter_ump_1_slice_mor ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone)
 • lassociator inserter_ump_1_slice_mor
     (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (inserter_ump_1_slice_pr1 ▹ β) =
(lassociator inserter_ump_1_slice_mor
   inserter_slice_pr1 α
 • (inserter_ump_1_slice_pr1 ▹ α))
• inserter_cone_cell q

         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone

α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β
(inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_to_eq
 ◃ rassociator p' p (pr1 α))
• ((inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_to_eq ◃ (p' ◃ γ))
   • ((inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_to_eq
       ◃ lassociator p' p (pr1 β))
      • (lassociator inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_to_eq
           (p' · p) (pr1 β)
         • ((lassociator
               (equifier_ump_mor HE
                  (inserter_ump_mor HI
                     (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
                     (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)))
                  inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_path) p' p
             ▹ pr1 β)
            • (((equifier_ump_mor_pr1 HE
                   (inserter_ump_mor HI
                      (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
                      (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)))
                   inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_path ▹ p)
                ▹ pr1 β)
               • (inserter_ump_mor_pr1 HI
                    (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
                    (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q))
                  ▹ pr1 β)))))) = ?b

ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B

α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧

E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β
?b =
lassociator inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_to_eq 
  (p' · p) (pr1 α)
• ((((lassociator
        (equifier_ump_mor HE
           (inserter_ump_mor HI
              (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
              (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)))
           inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_path) p' p ▹

        pr1 α))
    • (inserter_ump_mor_pr1 HI
         (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
         (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)) ▹ 
       pr1 α)) • pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q))

h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β
lassociator
  (equifier_ump_mor HE
     (inserter_ump_mor HI (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
        (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)))
     inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_path) p' (p · pr1 β)

           (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))

          inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_path ▹ p) ▹ pr1 β)
      • (inserter_ump_mor_pr1 HI
           (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
           (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)) ▹ pr1 β))) =
?t2

eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B

α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧

p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β

HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone

  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)

         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β
((((inserter_ump_1_slice_mor_to_eq ◃ (p' ◃ γ))

γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β

    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'

     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone

  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β

   (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)) ◃ γ)

     (inserter_ump_mor HI (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))

B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β
(inserter_ump_mor HI (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
   (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)) ◃ γ)
• (lassociator
     (inserter_ump_mor HI (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
        (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q))) p (pr1 β)
   • (inserter_ump_mor_pr1 HI
        (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
        (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)) ▹ pr1 β)) = ?b

• ((inserter_ump_mor_pr1 HI
      (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
      (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)) ▹ pr1 α)
   • pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)) =
lassociator
  (inserter_ump_mor HI (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
     (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q))) p (pr1 α)
• ((inserter_ump_mor_pr1 HI
      (pr1 (inserter_cone_pr1 q))
      (pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q)) ▹ pr1 α)
   • pr1 (inserter_cone_cell q))

      apply idpath.
    Qed.
  End InserterSliceUMP1.

  
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
has_inserter_ump_1 cone

• inserter_cone_cell q

B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
q: inserter_cone α β
invertible_2cell
  (inserter_ump_1_slice_mor q · inserter_cone_pr1 cone)
  (inserter_cone_pr1 q)
 exact (inserter_ump_1_slice_pr1 q).

b: B

◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
rassociator (pr1 u₁ · p') p (pr1 α)
• ((pr1 u₁ · p' ◃ γ)
   • (lassociator (pr1 u₁ · p') p (pr1 β)
      • ((rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p ▹ pr1 β)
         • ((pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 β)
            • (lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p ▹ pr1 β))))) =
(rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p ▹ pr1 α)
• ((pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 α)
   • ((lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p ▹ pr1 α)
      • (rassociator (pr1 u₂ · p') p (pr1 α)
         • ((pr1 u₂ · p' ◃ γ)
            • lassociator (pr1 u₂ · p') p (pr1 β)))))

    
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)

 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))

r':= maponpaths pr1 r: pr1
  (((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
     • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
    • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
   • (ζ ▹ β)) =
pr1
  ((((ζ ▹ α)
     • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
    • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
   • lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
rassociator (pr1 u₁ · p') p (pr1 α)
• ((pr1 u₁ · p' ◃ γ)
   • (lassociator (pr1 u₁ · p') p (pr1 β)
      • ((rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p ▹ pr1 β)
         • ((pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 β)
            • (lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p ▹ pr1 β))))) =
(rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p ▹ pr1 α)
• ((pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 α)
   • ((lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p ▹ pr1 α)
      • (rassociator (pr1 u₂ · p') p (pr1 α)
         • ((pr1 u₂ · p' ◃ γ)
            • lassociator (pr1 u₂ · p') p (pr1 β)))))

ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧

E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)

         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
r':= maponpaths pr1 r: ((rassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 α)
  • (pr1 u₁ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
 • lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 β))
• (pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 β) =
(((pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 α)
  • rassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 α))
 • (pr1 u₂ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
• lassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 β)
?b =
rassociator (pr1 u₁ · p') p (pr1 α)
• ((pr1 u₁ · p' ◃ γ)
   • (lassociator (pr1 u₁ · p') p (pr1 β)
      • ((rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p ▹ pr1 β)
         • ((pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 β)
            • (lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p ▹ pr1 β)))))

    
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
r':= maponpaths pr1 r: ((rassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 α)
  • (pr1 u₁ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
 • lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 β))
• (pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 β) =
(((pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 α)
  • rassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 α))
 • (pr1 u₂ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
• lassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 β)
((rassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 α)
  • ((pr1 u₂ ◃ rassociator p' p (pr1 α))
     • lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' (p · pr1 α)))
 • (pr1 u₂ · p' ◃ γ))
• lassociator (pr1 u₂ · p') p (pr1 β) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B

        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice

      apply idpath.

ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧

p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
r':= maponpaths pr1 r: ((rassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 α)
  • (pr1 u₁ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
 • lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 β))
• (pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 β) =
(((pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 α)
  • rassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 α))
 • (pr1 u₂ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
• lassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 β)
(rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p ▹ pr1 α)
• ((pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 α)
   • (rassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 α)
      • ((pr1 u₂ ◃ rassociator p' p (pr1 α))
         • (((pr1 u₂ ◃ (p' ◃ γ))
             • lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' (p · pr1 β))
            • lassociator (pr1 u₂ · p') p (pr1 β))))) =
rassociator (pr1 u₁ · p') p (pr1 α)
• ((pr1 u₁ · p' ◃ γ)
   • (lassociator (pr1 u₁ · p') p (pr1 β)
      • ((rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p ▹ pr1 β)
         • ((pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 β)
            • (lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p ▹ pr1 β)))))

    
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
r':= maponpaths pr1 r: ((rassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 α)
  • (pr1 u₁ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
 • lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 β))
• (pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 β) =
(((pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 α)
  • rassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 α))
 • (pr1 u₂ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
• lassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 β)
(rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p ▹ pr1 α)
• ((pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 α)
   • (rassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 α)
      • ((pr1 u₂ ◃ rassociator p' p (pr1 α))
         • (((pr1 u₂ ◃ (p' ◃ γ))
             • lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' (p · pr1 β))
            • lassociator (pr1 u₂ · p') p (pr1 β))))) =
?b
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
r':= maponpaths pr1 r: ((rassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 α)
  • (pr1 u₁ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
 • lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 β))
• (pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 β) =
(((pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 α)
  • rassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 α))
 • (pr1 u₂ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
• lassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 β)
?b =
rassociator (pr1 u₁ · p') p (pr1 α)
• ((pr1 u₁ · p' ◃ γ)
   • (lassociator (pr1 u₁ · p') p (pr1 β)
      • ((rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p ▹ pr1 β)
         • ((pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 β)
            • (lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p ▹ pr1 β)))))

ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B

α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧

ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B

α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧

p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β

E:= pr1

     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'

   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

        apply idpath.

     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

         (((p ◃ pr12 α)

          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
r':= maponpaths pr1 r: ((rassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 α)
  • (pr1 u₁ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
 • lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 β))
• (pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 β) =
(((pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 α)
  • rassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 α))
 • (pr1 u₂ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
• lassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 β)
(pr1 u₂ ◃ (rassociator p' p (pr1 α) • (p' ◃ γ)))
• (((pr1 u₂ ◃ lassociator p' p (pr1 β))
    • lassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 β))
   • (lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p ▹ pr1 β)) = ?t20

        
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
r':= maponpaths pr1 r: ((rassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 α)
  • (pr1 u₁ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
 • lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 β))
• (pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 β) =
(((pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 α)
  • rassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 α))
 • (pr1 u₂ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
• lassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 β)
(((pr1 u₂ ◃ (rassociator p' p (pr1 α) • (p' ◃ γ)))
  • (pr1 u₂ ◃ lassociator p' p (pr1 β)))
 • lassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 β))
• (lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p ▹ pr1 β) = ?t20

  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)

  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b

ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))

  ◃ ((rassociator p' p (pr1 α) • (p' ◃ γ))
     • lassociator p' p (pr1 β)))
 • lassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 β))
• (lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p ▹ pr1 β) = ?t20

        apply idpath.

  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)

   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'

E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)

 • lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 β))

 • (pr1 u₂ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))

(pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 α)
• (rassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 α)
   • (((pr1 u₂
        ◃ ((rassociator p' p (pr1 α) • (p' ◃ γ))
           • lassociator p' p (pr1 β)))
       • lassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 β))
      • (lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p ▹ pr1 β))) = ?t2

ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b

I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)

E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B

        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone

  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))

• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)

  • (pr1 u₁ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))

• (pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 β) =
(((pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 α)
  • rassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 α))
 • (pr1 u₂ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
• lassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 β)
(((pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 α)
  • rassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 α))
 • (pr1 u₂
    ◃ ((rassociator p' p (pr1 α) • (p' ◃ γ))
       • lassociator p' p (pr1 β))))
• lassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 β) = ?y'

      exact (!r').

b: B

γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β

HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)

  ((p ◃ pr12 β)

cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice

ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone

  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))

      • ((rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p ▹ pr1 β)
         • ((pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 β)
            • (lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p ▹ pr1 β)))))

  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
r':= maponpaths pr1 r: ((rassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 α)
  • (pr1 u₁ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
 • lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 β))
• (pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 β) =
(((pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 α)
  • rassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 α))
 • (pr1 u₂ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
• lassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 β)
?b =
((rassociator (pr1 u₁ · p') p (pr1 α)
  • (pr1 u₁ · p' ◃ γ))
 • lassociator (pr1 u₁ · p') p (pr1 β))
• (rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p ▹ pr1 β)

    
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone

  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))

 • (pr1 u₁ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
• lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 β) = ?b

          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B

    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'

   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))

  • rassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 α))
 • (pr1 u₂ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
• lassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 β)
id₂ (pr1 α) ⋆⋆ rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p
• rassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 α) = ?y'

ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B

α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧

p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)

E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone

  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))

rassociator (pr1 u₁ · p') p (pr1 α)
• (rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' (p · pr1 α)
   • lassociator p' p (pr1 α) ⋆⋆ id₂ (pr1 u₁)) = ?y'

ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧

p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β

HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)

         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
r':= maponpaths pr1 r: ((rassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 α)
  • (pr1 u₁ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
 • lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 β))

(((pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 α)
  • rassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 α))
 • (pr1 u₂ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
• lassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 β)
rassociator (pr1 u₁ · p') p (pr1 α)
• (rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' (p · pr1 α)
   • (pr1 u₁ ◃ lassociator p' p (pr1 α))) = ?y'

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
r':= maponpaths pr1 r: ((rassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 α)
  • (pr1 u₁ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
 • lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 β))
• (pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 β) =
(((pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 α)
  • rassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 α))
 • (pr1 u₂ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
• lassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 β)
((rassociator (pr1 u₁ · p') p (pr1 α)
  • (rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' (p · pr1 α)
     • (pr1 u₁ ◃ lassociator p' p (pr1 α))))
 • (pr1 u₁ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
• lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 β) =
((rassociator (pr1 u₁ · p') p (pr1 α)
  • (pr1 u₁ · p' ◃ γ))
 • lassociator (pr1 u₁ · p') p (pr1 β))
• (rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p ▹ pr1 β)

    
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
r':= maponpaths pr1 r: ((rassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 α)
  • (pr1 u₁ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
 • lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 β))
• (pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 β) =
(((pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 α)
  • rassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 α))
 • (pr1 u₂ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
• lassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 β)
rassociator (pr1 u₁ · p') p (pr1 α)
• (rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' (p · pr1 α)
   • ((pr1 u₁ ◃ lassociator p' p (pr1 α))
      • ((pr1 u₁ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell)
         • lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 β)))) =
rassociator (pr1 u₁ · p') p (pr1 α)
• ((pr1 u₁ · p' ◃ γ)
   • (lassociator (pr1 u₁ · p') p (pr1 β)
      • (rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p ▹ pr1 β)))

    
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧

p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧

E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

         (((p ◃ pr12 α)

          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'

   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)

  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β

u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)

  • (pr1 u₁ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
 • lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 β))

 • (pr1 u₂ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
• lassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 β)

• ((pr1 u₁ ◃ lassociator p' p (pr1 α))
   • ((pr1 u₁ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell)
      • lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 β))) =

• (lassociator (pr1 u₁ · p') p (pr1 β)
   • (rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p ▹ pr1 β))

    
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
r':= maponpaths pr1 r: ((rassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 α)
  • (pr1 u₁ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
 • lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 β))
• (pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 β) =
(((pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 α)
  • rassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 α))
 • (pr1 u₂ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
• lassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 β)
(pr1 u₁ ◃ lassociator p' p (pr1 α))
• ((pr1 u₁ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell)
   • lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 β)) =
(is_invertible_2cell_rassociator (pr1 u₁) p'
   (p · pr1 α)) ^-1
• ((pr1 u₁ · p' ◃ γ)
   • (lassociator (pr1 u₁ · p') p (pr1 β)
      • (rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p ▹ pr1 β)))

ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧

p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B

        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
