         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
r':= maponpaths pr1 r: ((rassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 α)
  • (pr1 u₁ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
 • lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 β))
• (pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 β) =
(((pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 α)
  • rassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 α))
 • (pr1 u₂ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
• lassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 β)
(pr1 u₁ ◃ lassociator p' p (pr1 α))
• ((pr1 u₁ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell)
   • lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 β)) =
lassociator (pr1 u₁) p' (p · pr1 α)
• ((pr1 u₁ · p' ◃ γ)
   • (lassociator (pr1 u₁ · p') p (pr1 β)
      • (rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p ▹ pr1 β)))

    
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧

p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
r':= maponpaths pr1 r: ((rassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 α)
  • (pr1 u₁ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
 • lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 β))
• (pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 β) =
(((pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 α)
  • rassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 α))
 • (pr1 u₂ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
• lassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 β)
((pr1 u₁ ◃ lassociator p' p (pr1 α))
 • (pr1 u₁ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
• lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 β) =
((lassociator (pr1 u₁) p' (p · pr1 α)
  • (pr1 u₁ · p' ◃ γ))
 • lassociator (pr1 u₁ · p') p (pr1 β))
• (rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p ▹ pr1 β)

    
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
r':= maponpaths pr1 r: ((rassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 α)
  • (pr1 u₁ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
 • lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 β))
• (pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 β) =
(((pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 α)
  • rassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 α))
 • (pr1 u₂ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
• lassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 β)
((pr1 u₁ ◃ lassociator p' p (pr1 α))
 • (pr1 u₁ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
• lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 β) =
(((pr1 u₁ ◃ (p' ◃ γ))
  • lassociator (pr1 u₁) p' (p · pr1 β))
 • lassociator (pr1 u₁ · p') p (pr1 β))
• (rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p ▹ pr1 β)

u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone

ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B

α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧

p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β

HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)

          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
r':= maponpaths pr1 r: ((rassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 α)
  • (pr1 u₁ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
 • lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 β))

 • (pr1 u₂ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))

• (lassociator (pr1 u₁) p' (p · pr1 β)
   • (lassociator (pr1 u₁ · p') p (pr1 β)
      • (rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p ▹ pr1 β))) =
(pr1 u₁ ◃ lassociator p' p (pr1 α))
• ((pr1 u₁ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell)
   • lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 β))

b: B

  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)

  ((p ◃ pr12 β)

   • (lassociator (pr1 u₁ · p') p (pr1 β)
      • (rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p ▹ pr1 β))) = ?b
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧

I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)

E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B

        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)

         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone

(pr1 u₁ ◃ lassociator p' p (pr1 α))
• ((pr1 u₁ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell)

b: B

p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β

     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

  • rassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 α))
 • (pr1 u₂ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
• lassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 β)
(pr1 u₁ ◃ lassociator p' p (pr1 β))
• (lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 β)
   • ((lassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p ▹ pr1 β)
      • (rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p ▹ pr1 β))) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone

  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))

• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
r':= maponpaths pr1 r: ((rassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 α)
  • (pr1 u₁ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))

       • rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p) ▹ pr1 β)) = ?t2

      apply idpath.

  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)

  ((p ◃ pr12 β)

  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β

ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone

(pr1 u₁ ◃ (p' ◃ γ))
• ((pr1 u₁ ◃ lassociator p' p (pr1 β))

• ((pr1 u₁ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell)
   • lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 β))

    
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β

u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone

  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))

• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
r':= maponpaths pr1 r: ((rassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 α)
  • (pr1 u₁ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
 • lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 β))
• (pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 β) =
(((pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 α)
  • rassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 α))
 • (pr1 u₂ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
• lassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 β)
((pr1 u₁ ◃ (p' ◃ γ))
 • (pr1 u₁ ◃ lassociator p' p (pr1 β)))
• lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 β) =
((pr1 u₁ ◃ lassociator p' p (pr1 α))
 • (pr1 u₁ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
• lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 β)

eq_B: has_equifiers B

α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧

p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1

     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

         (((p ◃ pr12 α)

          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)

   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)

(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
r':= maponpaths pr1 r: ((rassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 α)
  • (pr1 u₁ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
 • lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 β))
• (pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 β) =
(((pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 α)
  • rassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 α))
 • (pr1 u₂ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
• lassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 β)
(p' ◃ γ) • lassociator p' p (pr1 β) =
((lassociator p' p (pr1 α) • rassociator p' p (pr1 α))
 • (p' ◃ γ)) • lassociator p' p (pr1 β)

    
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
r':= maponpaths pr1 r: ((rassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 α)
  • (pr1 u₁ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
 • lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 β))
• (pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 β) =
(((pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 α)
  • rassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 α))
 • (pr1 u₂ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
• lassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 β)
(p' ◃ γ) • lassociator p' p (pr1 β) =
(id₂ (p' · (p · pr1 α)) • (p' ◃ γ))
• lassociator p' p (pr1 β)

    
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
r':= maponpaths pr1 r: ((rassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 α)
  • (pr1 u₁ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
 • lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr1 β))
• (pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 β) =
(((pr1 ζ ▹ pr1 α)
  • rassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 α))
 • (pr1 u₂ ◃ inserter_slice_cell_cell))
• lassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr1 β)
(p' ◃ γ) • lassociator p' p (pr1 β) =
(p' ◃ γ) • lassociator p' p (pr1 β)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  Section InserterUMP2Slice.
    Context {h : slice_bicat b}
            {u₁ u₂ : h --> cone}
            (ζ : u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==> u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone)
            (r : rassociator _ _ _
                 • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone)
                 • lassociator _ _ _
                 • (ζ ▹ β)
                 =
                 (ζ ▹ α)
                 • rassociator _ _ _
                 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone)
                 • lassociator _ _ _).

    
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))

• (ζ ▹ β) =

  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)

• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
pr1 u₁ ==> pr1 u₂

         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
pr1 u₁ · equifier_cone_pr1 E_cone
· inserter_cone_pr1 I_cone ==>
pr1 u₂ · equifier_cone_pr1 E_cone
· inserter_cone_pr1 I_cone

ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β

u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone

HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone

• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
pr12 u₁
• (equifier_ump_cell HE
     (inserter_ump_cell HI
        ((rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p • pr1 ζ)
         • lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p)
        (inserter_ump_path_help ζ r))
   ▹ p' · p · pr2 h₁) = pr12 u₂

      
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧

p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone

  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
pr12 u₁
• (lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr2 h₁)
   • (((equifier_ump_cell HE
          (inserter_ump_cell HI
             ((rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p • pr1 ζ)
              • lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p)
             (inserter_ump_path_help ζ r)) ▹ p' · p)
       • lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p) ▹ pr2 h₁)) =
pr12 u₂
• (lassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr2 h₁)
   • (lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p ▹ pr2 h₁))

ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B

α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧

p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧

     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))

         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)

   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)

HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
?b =
pr12 u₂
• (lassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr2 h₁)
   • (lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p ▹ pr2 h₁))

p'

   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)

   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone

  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))

• (ζ ▹ β) =

  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)

• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
(((lassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p
   • rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p) • pr1 ζ)
 • lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p) ▹ pr2 h₁ = ?t2

u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone

 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
((id₂ (pr1 u₁ · (p' · p)) • pr1 ζ)
 • lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p) ▹ pr2 h₁ = ?t2

   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =

   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)

   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β

u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧

u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone

  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))

(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
(pr1 ζ • lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p) ▹ pr2 h₁ = ?t2

        apply idpath.

ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B

E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B

        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)

         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

         (((p ◃ pr12 α)

          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
q: (pr2 u₁ • lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr2 h₁))
• (pr1 ζ ▹ pr2 h₁) =
pr2 u₂ • lassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr2 h₁)
(pr12 u₁ • lassociator (pr1 u₁) (p' · p) (pr2 h₁))
• (pr1 ζ ▹ pr2 h₁) =
pr12 u₂ • lassociator (pr1 u₂) (p' · p) (pr2 h₁)

      exact q.
    Qed.

    
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
u₁ ==> u₂

  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β

u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone

 exact inserter_ump_2_slice_cell_cell.

cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
cell_slice_homot u₁ u₂ inserter_ump_2_slice_cell_cell
 exact inserter_ump_2_slice_cell_homot.
    Defined.

    
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
inserter_ump_2_slice_cell ▹ inserter_slice_pr1 = ζ

u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
(equifier_ump_cell HE
   (inserter_ump_cell HI
      ((rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p • pr1 ζ)
       • lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p)
      (inserter_ump_path_help ζ r)) ▹ p' · p)
• lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p =
pr1 ζ • lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p

p'

   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)

cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
lassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p
• ((equifier_ump_cell HE
      (inserter_ump_cell HI
         ((rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p • pr1 ζ)
          • lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p)
         (inserter_ump_path_help ζ r)) ▹ p') ▹ p) =
pr1 ζ • lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p

ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
lassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p
• (inserter_ump_cell HI
     ((rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p • pr1 ζ)
      • lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p)
     (inserter_ump_path_help ζ r) ▹ p) =
pr1 ζ • lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p

E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
pr1 ζ • lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p =
pr1 ζ • lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p

      apply idpath.
    Qed.
  End InserterUMP2Slice.

  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)

  ((p ◃ pr12 β)

          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
has_inserter_ump_2 cone

         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
has_inserter_ump_2 cone

    
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
∑ ζ0 : u₁ ==> u₂, ζ0 ▹ inserter_cone_pr1 cone = ζ

       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
has_inserter_ump_eq cone

ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β

HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B

        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
φ₁, φ₂: u₁ ==> u₂
s₁: φ₁ ▹ inserter_cone_pr1 cone = ζ
s₂: φ₂ ▹ inserter_cone_pr1 cone = ζ
φ₁ = φ₂

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
φ₁, φ₂: u₁ ==> u₂
s₁: φ₁ ▹ inserter_cone_pr1 cone = ζ
s₂: φ₂ ▹ inserter_cone_pr1 cone = ζ
pr1 u₁ · equifier_cone_pr1 E_cone ==>
pr1 u₂ · equifier_cone_pr1 E_cone
 
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β

   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'

  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

    (pr1 β)

   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'

   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone

· inserter_cone_pr1 I_cone ==>

· inserter_cone_pr1 I_cone
 exact (rassociator _ _ _ • pr1 ζ • lassociator _ _ _).

ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧

p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β

HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β

s₁: φ₁ ▹ inserter_cone_pr1 cone = ζ

((rassociator (pr1 u₁ · equifier_cone_pr1 E_cone)
    (inserter_cone_pr1 I_cone) (pr1 α)
  • (pr1 u₁ · equifier_cone_pr1 E_cone
     ◃ inserter_cone_cell I_cone))
 • lassociator (pr1 u₁ · equifier_cone_pr1 E_cone)
     (inserter_cone_pr1 I_cone) (pr1 β))
• (((rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p • pr1 ζ)
    • lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p) ▹ pr1 β) =
(((((rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p • pr1 ζ)
    • lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p) ▹ pr1 α)
  • rassociator (pr1 u₂ · equifier_cone_pr1 E_cone)
      (inserter_cone_pr1 I_cone) (pr1 α))
 • (pr1 u₂ · equifier_cone_pr1 E_cone
    ◃ inserter_cone_cell I_cone))
• lassociator (pr1 u₂ · equifier_cone_pr1 E_cone)
    (inserter_cone_pr1 I_cone) (pr1 β)
 exact (inserter_ump_path_help ζ r).
    
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
φ₁, φ₂: u₁ ==> u₂
s₁: φ₁ ▹ inserter_cone_pr1 cone = ζ
s₂: φ₂ ▹ inserter_cone_pr1 cone = ζ
pr1 φ₁ ▹ equifier_cone_pr1 E_cone =
inserter_ump_cell HI
  ((rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p • pr1 ζ)
   • lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p)
  (inserter_ump_path_help ζ r)
 
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone

p'

     (inserter_cone_pr1 I_cone) (pr1 β))
• (((rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p • pr1 ζ)
    • lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p) ▹ pr1 β) =
(((((rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p • pr1 ζ)
    • lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p) ▹ pr1 α)
  • rassociator (pr1 u₂ · equifier_cone_pr1 E_cone)
      (inserter_cone_pr1 I_cone) (pr1 α))
 • (pr1 u₂ · equifier_cone_pr1 E_cone
    ◃ inserter_cone_cell I_cone))
• lassociator (pr1 u₂ · equifier_cone_pr1 E_cone)
    (inserter_cone_pr1 I_cone) (pr1 β)
 exact (inserter_ump_path_help ζ r).
      
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
φ₁, φ₂: u₁ ==> u₂
s₁: φ₁ ▹ inserter_cone_pr1 cone = ζ
s₂: φ₂ ▹ inserter_cone_pr1 cone = ζ
(pr1 φ₁ ▹ equifier_cone_pr1 E_cone)
▹ inserter_cone_pr1 I_cone =
(rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p • pr1 ζ)
• lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p

u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone

pr1 φ₁ ▹ p' · p = pr1 ζ

        exact (maponpaths pr1 s₁).

• (ζ ▹ β) =

  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
φ₁, φ₂: u₁ ==> u₂
s₁: φ₁ ▹ inserter_cone_pr1 cone = ζ
s₂: φ₂ ▹ inserter_cone_pr1 cone = ζ
inserter_ump_cell HI
  ((rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p • pr1 ζ)
   • lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p)
  (inserter_ump_path_help ζ r)
▹ inserter_cone_pr1 I_cone =
(rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p • pr1 ζ)
• lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p
 apply (inserter_ump_cell_pr1 HI).
    
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β

  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
φ₁, φ₂: u₁ ==> u₂
s₁: φ₁ ▹ inserter_cone_pr1 cone = ζ
s₂: φ₂ ▹ inserter_cone_pr1 cone = ζ
pr1 u₁ · equifier_cone_pr1 E_cone
· inserter_cone_pr1 I_cone ==>
pr1 u₂ · equifier_cone_pr1 E_cone
· inserter_cone_pr1 I_cone
 exact (rassociator _ _ _ • pr1 ζ • lassociator _ _ _).
      
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
φ₁, φ₂: u₁ ==> u₂
s₁: φ₁ ▹ inserter_cone_pr1 cone = ζ
s₂: φ₂ ▹ inserter_cone_pr1 cone = ζ
((rassociator (pr1 u₁ · equifier_cone_pr1 E_cone)
    (inserter_cone_pr1 I_cone) (pr1 α)
  • (pr1 u₁ · equifier_cone_pr1 E_cone
     ◃ inserter_cone_cell I_cone))
 • lassociator (pr1 u₁ · equifier_cone_pr1 E_cone)
     (inserter_cone_pr1 I_cone) (pr1 β))
• (((rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p • pr1 ζ)
    • lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p) ▹ pr1 β) =
(((((rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p • pr1 ζ)
    • lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p) ▹ pr1 α)
  • rassociator (pr1 u₂ · equifier_cone_pr1 E_cone)
      (inserter_cone_pr1 I_cone) (pr1 α))
 • (pr1 u₂ · equifier_cone_pr1 E_cone
    ◃ inserter_cone_cell I_cone))
• lassociator (pr1 u₂ · equifier_cone_pr1 E_cone)
    (inserter_cone_pr1 I_cone) (pr1 β)
 exact (inserter_ump_path_help ζ r).
      
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧

p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β

E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))

p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β

s₁: φ₁ ▹ inserter_cone_pr1 cone = ζ

▹ inserter_cone_pr1 I_cone =
(rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p • pr1 ζ)
• lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p

▹ inserter_cone_pr1 I_cone =
rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p
• (pr1 ζ • lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p)

   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)

  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)

  ((p ◃ pr12 β)

h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))

• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β

s₁: φ₁ ▹ inserter_cone_pr1 cone = ζ
s₂: φ₂ ▹ inserter_cone_pr1 cone = ζ
lassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p • ((pr1 φ₂ ▹ p') ▹ p) =
pr1 ζ • lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p

  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)

   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))

         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)

• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β

s₁: φ₁ ▹ inserter_cone_pr1 cone = ζ
s₂: φ₂ ▹ inserter_cone_pr1 cone = ζ
(pr1 φ₂ ▹ p' · p) • lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p =
pr1 ζ • lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p

ins_B: has_inserters B

  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
