        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
φ₁, φ₂: u₁ ==> u₂
s₁: φ₁ ▹ inserter_cone_pr1 cone = ζ
s₂: φ₂ ▹ inserter_cone_pr1 cone = ζ
pr1 φ₂ ▹ p' · p = pr1 ζ

        exact (maponpaths pr1 s₂).
      
B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
I:= pr1 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B
p:= pr12 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): B ⟦ I, pr1 h₁ ⟧
γ:= pr122 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): p · pr1 α ==> p · pr1 β
I_cone:= make_inserter_cone I p γ: inserter_cone (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
HI:= pr222 (ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)): has_inserter_ump I_cone
E:= pr1
  (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
     (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
     (((p ◃ pr12 α)
       • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
      • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
     ((p ◃ pr12 β) • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B
p':= pr12 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
        (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
        (((p ◃ pr12 α)
          • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
         • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
        ((p ◃ pr12 β)
         • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): B ⟦ E, I ⟧
path:= pr122 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁)
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): p'
◃ (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂)) =
p'
◃ ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
E_cone:= make_equifier_cone E p' path: equifier_cone (p · pr2 h₁)
  (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
  (((p ◃ pr12 α)
    • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
   • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
  ((p ◃ pr12 β)
   • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))
HE:= pr222 (eq_B I b (p · pr2 h₁) 
         (p · pr1 β · pr2 h₂)
         (((p ◃ pr12 α)
           • lassociator p (pr1 α) (pr2 h₂))
          • (γ ▹ pr2 h₂))
         ((p ◃ pr12 β)
          • lassociator p (pr1 β) (pr2 h₂))): has_equifier_ump E_cone
cone:= make_inserter_cone inserter_slice
  inserter_slice_pr1 inserter_slice_cell: inserter_cone α β
h: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h, cone ⟧
ζ: u₁ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone ==>
u₂ · inserter_cone_pr1 cone
r: ((rassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α
  • (u₁ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
 • lassociator u₁ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β)
• (ζ ▹ β) =
(((ζ ▹ α)
  • rassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) α)
 • (u₂ ◃ inserter_cone_cell cone))
• lassociator u₂ (inserter_cone_pr1 cone) β
φ₁, φ₂: u₁ ==> u₂
s₁: φ₁ ▹ inserter_cone_pr1 cone = ζ
s₂: φ₂ ▹ inserter_cone_pr1 cone = ζ
inserter_ump_cell HI
  ((rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p • pr1 ζ)
   • lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p)
  (inserter_ump_path_help ζ r)
▹ inserter_cone_pr1 I_cone =
(rassociator (pr1 u₁) p' p • pr1 ζ)
• lassociator (pr1 u₂) p' p
 apply (inserter_ump_cell_pr1 HI).
  Qed.

  Definition inserter_ump_slice
    : has_inserter_ump cone
    := inserter_ump_1_slice ,, inserter_ump_2_slice ,, inserter_ump_eq_slice.
End InsertersSlice.


B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
has_inserters (slice_bicat b)

b: B
has_inserters (slice_bicat b)

∑ (i : slice_bicat b) (m : slice_bicat b ⟦ i, h₁ ⟧)
(α0 : m · α ==> m · β),
has_inserter_ump (make_inserter_cone i m α0)

B: bicat
ins_B: has_inserters B
eq_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
α, β: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
(λ α0 : inserter_slice_pr1 ins_B eq_B α β · α ==>
        inserter_slice_pr1 ins_B eq_B α β · β,
 has_inserter_ump
   (make_inserter_cone (inserter_slice ins_B eq_B α β)
      (inserter_slice_pr1 ins_B eq_B α β) α0))
  (inserter_slice_cell ins_B eq_B α β)
 exact (inserter_ump_slice ins_B eq_B α β).
Defined.

(**
 4. Equifiers
 *)
Section EquifierSlice.
  Context {B : bicat}
          (b : B)
          {eq h₁ h₂ : slice_bicat b}
          {f₁ f₂ : h₁ --> h₂}
          (α β : f₁ ==> f₂)
          (e : eq --> h₁)
          (p : e ◃ α = e ◃ β)
          (cone := make_equifier_cone (pr1 eq) (pr1 e) (maponpaths pr1 p))
          (H : has_equifier_ump cone).

  Section EquifierUMP1.
    Context (q : equifier_cone f₁ f₂ α β).

    Definition equifier_ump_1_slice_mor_mor
      : pr11 q --> pr1 eq
      := equifier_ump_mor
           H
           (pr1 (equifier_cone_pr1 q))
           (maponpaths pr1 (equifier_cone_eq q)).

    Definition equifier_ump_1_slice_mor_inv2cell
      : invertible_2cell
          (pr21 q)
          (equifier_ump_1_slice_mor_mor · pr2 eq)
      := comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (pr2 (equifier_cone_pr1 q))
           (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell _ (pr2 e))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (lassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _)
                    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                       _
                       (equifier_ump_mor_pr1 H _ _))))).

    Defined.

    Definition equifier_ump_1_slice_pr1_cell_cell
      : equifier_ump_1_slice_mor_mor · pr1 e ==> pr1 (equifier_cone_pr1 q)
      := equifier_ump_mor_pr1 H _ _.

B: bicat
b: B
eq, h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
f₁, f₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧

p: e ◃ α = e ◃ β

H: has_equifier_ump cone
q: equifier_cone f₁ f₂ α β
((pr2 (equifier_cone_pr1 q)
  • ((((pr2
          (equifier_ump_mor_pr1 H
             (pr1 (equifier_cone_pr1 q))
             (maponpaths pr1 (equifier_cone_eq q))))
       ^-1 ▹ pr2 h₁)
      • rassociator
          (equifier_ump_mor H
             (pr1 (equifier_cone_pr1 q))
             (maponpaths pr1 (equifier_cone_eq q)))
          (pr1 e) (pr2 h₁))
     • (equifier_ump_mor H (pr1 (equifier_cone_pr1 q))
          (maponpaths pr1 (equifier_cone_eq q))
        ◃ (pr22 e) ^-1)))
 • ((equifier_ump_1_slice_mor_mor ◃ pr2 e)
    • lassociator equifier_ump_1_slice_mor_mor (pr1 e)
        (pr2 h₁)))
• (equifier_ump_1_slice_pr1_cell_cell ▹ pr2 h₁) =
pr12 (equifier_cone_pr1 q)

      
B: bicat
b: B
eq, h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
f₁, f₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
α, β: f₁ ==> f₂

p: e ◃ α = e ◃ β
cone:= make_equifier_cone (pr1 eq) (pr1 e) (maponpaths pr1 p): equifier_cone (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
H: has_equifier_ump cone
q: equifier_cone f₁ f₂ α β
pr2 (equifier_cone_pr1 q)
• (((pr2
       (equifier_ump_mor_pr1 H
          (pr1 (equifier_cone_pr1 q))
          (maponpaths pr1 (equifier_cone_eq q)))) ^-1
    ▹ pr2 h₁)
   • (rassociator
        (equifier_ump_mor H
           (pr1 (equifier_cone_pr1 q))

        (pr1 e) (pr2 h₁)

            (pr1 (equifier_cone_pr1 q))
            (maponpaths pr1 (equifier_cone_eq q))
          ◃ (pr22 e) ^-1)

                 (pr2 h₁)

                  ▹ pr2 h₁)))))) =
pr12 (equifier_cone_pr1 q)

B: bicat
b: B
eq, h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
f₁, f₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
α, β: f₁ ==> f₂
e: slice_bicat b ⟦ eq, h₁ ⟧
p: e ◃ α = e ◃ β
cone:= make_equifier_cone (pr1 eq) (pr1 e) (maponpaths pr1 p): equifier_cone (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
H: has_equifier_ump cone
q: equifier_cone f₁ f₂ α β
(equifier_ump_mor H (pr1 (equifier_cone_pr1 q))
   (maponpaths pr1 (equifier_cone_eq q))
 ◃ (pr22 e) ^-1)
• ((equifier_ump_1_slice_mor_mor ◃ pr2 e)
   • (lassociator equifier_ump_1_slice_mor_mor (pr1 e)
        (pr2 h₁)
      • (equifier_ump_1_slice_pr1_cell_cell ▹ pr2 h₁))) =
?t2

        apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
    Defined.
  End EquifierUMP1.

  
B: bicat
b: B
eq, h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
f₁, f₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
α, β: f₁ ==> f₂
e: slice_bicat b ⟦ eq, h₁ ⟧
p: e ◃ α = e ◃ β
cone:= make_equifier_cone (pr1 eq) (pr1 e) (maponpaths pr1 p): equifier_cone (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
H: has_equifier_ump cone
has_equifier_ump_1 (make_equifier_cone eq e p)

b: B
eq, h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b

H: has_equifier_ump cone

invertible_2cell
  (?k · equifier_cone_pr1 (make_equifier_cone eq e p))
  (equifier_cone_pr1 q)

    
B: bicat
b: B
eq, h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
f₁, f₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
α, β: f₁ ==> f₂
e: slice_bicat b ⟦ eq, h₁ ⟧
p: e ◃ α = e ◃ β
cone:= make_equifier_cone (pr1 eq) (pr1 e) (maponpaths pr1 p): equifier_cone (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
H: has_equifier_ump cone
q: equifier_cone f₁ f₂ α β
slice_bicat b ⟦ q, make_equifier_cone eq e p ⟧
 exact (equifier_ump_1_slice_mor q).
    
B: bicat
b: B
eq, h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
f₁, f₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
α, β: f₁ ==> f₂
e: slice_bicat b ⟦ eq, h₁ ⟧
p: e ◃ α = e ◃ β
cone:= make_equifier_cone (pr1 eq) (pr1 e) (maponpaths pr1 p): equifier_cone (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
H: has_equifier_ump cone
q: equifier_cone f₁ f₂ α β
invertible_2cell
  (equifier_ump_1_slice_mor q
   · equifier_cone_pr1 (make_equifier_cone eq e p))
  (equifier_cone_pr1 q)
 exact (equifier_ump_1_slice_pr1 q).
  Defined.

  Section EquifierUMP2.
    Context {g : slice_bicat b}
            (u₁ u₂ : g --> eq)
            (γ : u₁ · e ==> u₂ · e).

    Definition equifier_ump_2_in_slice_cell_cell
      : pr1 u₁ ==> pr1 u₂
      := equifier_ump_cell H (pr1 γ).

    
B: bicat
b: B
eq, h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
f₁, f₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
α, β: f₁ ==> f₂
e: slice_bicat b ⟦ eq, h₁ ⟧
p: e ◃ α = e ◃ β
cone:= make_equifier_cone (pr1 eq) (pr1 e) (maponpaths pr1 p): equifier_cone (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
H: has_equifier_ump cone
g: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ g, eq ⟧
γ: u₁ · e ==> u₂ · e
cell_slice_homot u₁ u₂
  equifier_ump_2_in_slice_cell_cell

  equifier_ump_2_in_slice_cell_cell

      
B: bicat
b: B
eq, h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
f₁, f₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
α, β: f₁ ==> f₂
e: slice_bicat b ⟦ eq, h₁ ⟧
p: e ◃ α = e ◃ β

H: has_equifier_ump cone
g: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ g, eq ⟧
γ: u₁ · e ==> u₂ · e
pr12 u₁ • (equifier_ump_2_in_slice_cell_cell ▹ pr2 eq) =
pr12 u₂

  ((pr1 u₂ ◃ pr12 e)

B: bicat

pr12 u₂

   • lassociator (pr1 u₂) (pr1 e) (pr2 h₁)) =
pr12 u₂

B: bicat
b: B

u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ g, eq ⟧
γ: u₁ · e ==> u₂ · e
(pr12 u₁ • (equifier_ump_cell H (pr1 γ) ▹ pr2 eq))
• ((pr1 u₂ ◃ pr12 e)
   • lassociator (pr1 u₂) (pr1 e) (pr2 h₁)) =
(pr2 u₁
 • ((pr1 u₁ ◃ pr2 e)
    • lassociator (pr1 u₁) (pr1 e) (pr2 h₁)))
• (pr1 γ ▹ pr2 h₁)

      
B: bicat
b: B
eq, h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
f₁, f₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
α, β: f₁ ==> f₂
e: slice_bicat b ⟦ eq, h₁ ⟧
p: e ◃ α = e ◃ β

H: has_equifier_ump cone
g: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ g, eq ⟧
γ: u₁ · e ==> u₂ · e
pr12 u₁
• ((equifier_ump_cell H (pr1 γ) ▹ pr2 eq)
   • ((pr1 u₂ ◃ pr12 e)
      • lassociator (pr1 u₂) (pr1 e) (pr2 h₁))) =
pr2 u₁
• ((pr1 u₁ ◃ pr2 e)
   • (lassociator (pr1 u₁) (pr1 e) (pr2 h₁)
      • (pr1 γ ▹ pr2 h₁)))

      
B: bicat
b: B
eq, h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
f₁, f₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧

e: slice_bicat b ⟦ eq, h₁ ⟧

H: has_equifier_ump cone
g: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ g, eq ⟧
γ: u₁ · e ==> u₂ · e
(equifier_ump_cell H (pr1 γ) ▹ pr2 eq)
• ((pr1 u₂ ◃ pr12 e)
   • lassociator (pr1 u₂) (pr1 e) (pr2 h₁)) =
(pr1 u₁ ◃ pr2 e)
• (lassociator (pr1 u₁) (pr1 e) (pr2 h₁)
   • (pr1 γ ▹ pr2 h₁))

      
B: bicat
b: B
eq, h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
f₁, f₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
α, β: f₁ ==> f₂
e: slice_bicat b ⟦ eq, h₁ ⟧
p: e ◃ α = e ◃ β

H: has_equifier_ump cone
g: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ g, eq ⟧
γ: u₁ · e ==> u₂ · e
((equifier_ump_cell H (pr1 γ) ▹ pr2 eq)
 • (pr1 u₂ ◃ pr12 e))
• lassociator (pr1 u₂) (pr1 e) (pr2 h₁) =
((pr1 u₁ ◃ pr2 e)
 • lassociator (pr1 u₁) (pr1 e) (pr2 h₁))
• (pr1 γ ▹ pr2 h₁)

      
B: bicat
b: B
eq, h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
f₁, f₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
α, β: f₁ ==> f₂
e: slice_bicat b ⟦ eq, h₁ ⟧
p: e ◃ α = e ◃ β
cone:= make_equifier_cone (pr1 eq) (pr1 e) (maponpaths pr1 p): equifier_cone (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
H: has_equifier_ump cone
g: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ g, eq ⟧
γ: u₁ · e ==> u₂ · e
((pr1 u₁ ◃ pr12 e)
 • (equifier_ump_cell H (pr1 γ) ▹ pr1 e · pr2 h₁))
• lassociator (pr1 u₂) (pr1 e) (pr2 h₁) =
((pr1 u₁ ◃ pr2 e)
 • lassociator (pr1 u₁) (pr1 e) (pr2 h₁))
• (pr1 γ ▹ pr2 h₁)

      
B: bicat
b: B
eq, h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
f₁, f₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
α, β: f₁ ==> f₂
e: slice_bicat b ⟦ eq, h₁ ⟧
p: e ◃ α = e ◃ β
cone:= make_equifier_cone (pr1 eq) (pr1 e) (maponpaths pr1 p): equifier_cone (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
H: has_equifier_ump cone
g: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ g, eq ⟧
γ: u₁ · e ==> u₂ · e
(pr1 u₁ ◃ pr12 e)
• ((equifier_ump_cell H (pr1 γ) ▹ pr1 e · pr2 h₁)
   • lassociator (pr1 u₂) (pr1 e) (pr2 h₁)) =
(pr1 u₁ ◃ pr2 e)
• (lassociator (pr1 u₁) (pr1 e) (pr2 h₁)
   • (pr1 γ ▹ pr2 h₁))

      
B: bicat
b: B
eq, h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
f₁, f₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
α, β: f₁ ==> f₂
e: slice_bicat b ⟦ eq, h₁ ⟧
p: e ◃ α = e ◃ β
cone:= make_equifier_cone (pr1 eq) (pr1 e) (maponpaths pr1 p): equifier_cone (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
H: has_equifier_ump cone
g: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ g, eq ⟧
γ: u₁ · e ==> u₂ · e
(equifier_ump_cell H (pr1 γ) ▹ pr1 e · pr2 h₁)
• lassociator (pr1 u₂) (pr1 e) (pr2 h₁) =
lassociator (pr1 u₁) (pr1 e) (pr2 h₁)
• (pr1 γ ▹ pr2 h₁)

      
B: bicat
b: B
eq, h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
f₁, f₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
α, β: f₁ ==> f₂
e: slice_bicat b ⟦ eq, h₁ ⟧
p: e ◃ α = e ◃ β
cone:= make_equifier_cone (pr1 eq) (pr1 e) (maponpaths pr1 p): equifier_cone (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
H: has_equifier_ump cone
g: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ g, eq ⟧
γ: u₁ · e ==> u₂ · e
lassociator (pr1 u₁) (pr1 e) (pr2 h₁)
• ((equifier_ump_cell H (pr1 γ) ▹ pr1 e) ▹ pr2 h₁) =
lassociator (pr1 u₁) (pr1 e) (pr2 h₁)
• (pr1 γ ▹ pr2 h₁)

      
B: bicat
b: B
eq, h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
f₁, f₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
α, β: f₁ ==> f₂
e: slice_bicat b ⟦ eq, h₁ ⟧
p: e ◃ α = e ◃ β
cone:= make_equifier_cone (pr1 eq) (pr1 e) (maponpaths pr1 p): equifier_cone (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
H: has_equifier_ump cone
g: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ g, eq ⟧
γ: u₁ · e ==> u₂ · e
equifier_ump_cell H (pr1 γ) ▹ pr1 e = pr1 γ

      apply (equifier_ump_cell_pr1 H).
    Qed.

γ: u₁ · e ==> u₂ · e

b: B

B: bicat
b: B
eq, h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
f₁, f₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
α, β: f₁ ==> f₂
e: slice_bicat b ⟦ eq, h₁ ⟧
p: e ◃ α = e ◃ β
cone:= make_equifier_cone (pr1 eq) (pr1 e) (maponpaths pr1 p): equifier_cone (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
H: has_equifier_ump cone
g: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ g, eq ⟧
γ: u₁ · e ==> u₂ · e
pr1 u₁ ==> pr1 u₂
 exact equifier_ump_2_in_slice_cell_cell.
      
B: bicat
b: B
eq, h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
f₁, f₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
α, β: f₁ ==> f₂
e: slice_bicat b ⟦ eq, h₁ ⟧
p: e ◃ α = e ◃ β
cone:= make_equifier_cone (pr1 eq) (pr1 e) (maponpaths pr1 p): equifier_cone (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
H: has_equifier_ump cone
g: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ g, eq ⟧
γ: u₁ · e ==> u₂ · e
cell_slice_homot u₁ u₂
  equifier_ump_2_in_slice_cell_cell
 exact equifier_ump_2_in_slice_cell_path.
    Defined.

g: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ g, eq ⟧
γ: u₁ · e ==> u₂ · e
equifier_ump_2_in_slice_cell ▹ e = γ

    
B: bicat
b: B
eq, h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
f₁, f₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
α, β: f₁ ==> f₂
e: slice_bicat b ⟦ eq, h₁ ⟧
p: e ◃ α = e ◃ β
cone:= make_equifier_cone (pr1 eq) (pr1 e) (maponpaths pr1 p): equifier_cone (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)

B: bicat
b: B
eq, h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
f₁, f₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
α, β: f₁ ==> f₂
e: slice_bicat b ⟦ eq, h₁ ⟧
p: e ◃ α = e ◃ β
cone:= make_equifier_cone (pr1 eq) (pr1 e) (maponpaths pr1 p): equifier_cone (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
H: has_equifier_ump cone
g: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ g, eq ⟧
γ: u₁ · e ==> u₂ · e
equifier_ump_2_in_slice_cell_cell ▹ pr1 e = pr1 γ

      apply (equifier_ump_cell_pr1 H).
    Qed.
  End EquifierUMP2.

  Definition equifier_ump_2_in_slice
    : has_equifier_ump_2 (make_equifier_cone eq e p)
    := λ g u₁ u₂ γ,
       equifier_ump_2_in_slice_cell u₁ u₂ γ
       ,,
       equifier_ump_2_in_slice_pr1 u₁ u₂ γ.

B: bicat
b: B

q₁: φ₁

γ
q₂: φ₂
▹ equifier_cone_pr1 (make_equifier_cone eq e p) =

pr1 φ₁ ▹ equifier_cone_pr1 cone = pr1 γ
 exact (maponpaths pr1 q₁).
    
B: bicat
b: B
eq, h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
f₁, f₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
α, β: f₁ ==> f₂
e: slice_bicat b ⟦ eq, h₁ ⟧
p: e ◃ α = e ◃ β
cone:= make_equifier_cone (pr1 eq) (pr1 e) (maponpaths pr1 p): equifier_cone (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂) (pr1 α) (pr1 β)
H: has_equifier_ump cone
g: slice_bicat b
u₁, u₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ g, make_equifier_cone eq e p ⟧
γ: u₁ · equifier_cone_pr1 (make_equifier_cone eq e p) ==>
u₂ · equifier_cone_pr1 (make_equifier_cone eq e p)
φ₁, φ₂: u₁ ==> u₂
q₁: φ₁
▹ equifier_cone_pr1 (make_equifier_cone eq e p) =
γ
q₂: φ₂
▹ equifier_cone_pr1 (make_equifier_cone eq e p) =
γ
pr1 φ₂ ▹ equifier_cone_pr1 cone = pr1 γ
 exact (maponpaths pr1 q₂).
  Qed.

  Definition equifier_ump_in_slice
    : has_equifier_ump (make_equifier_cone eq e p)
    := equifier_ump_1_in_slice
       ,,
       equifier_ump_2_in_slice
       ,,
       equifier_ump_eq_in_slice.
End EquifierSlice.


B: bicat
ins_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
has_equifiers (slice_bicat b)

b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
f₁, f₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
α, β: f₁ ==> f₂
∑ (i : slice_bicat b) (m : slice_bicat b ⟦ i, h₁ ⟧)
(p : m ◃ α = m ◃ β),
has_equifier_ump (make_equifier_cone i m p)

  
B: bicat
ins_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
f₁, f₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
α, β: f₁ ==> f₂
e:= ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) 
  (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂) (pr1 α) 
  (pr1 β): ∑ (i : B) (m : B ⟦ i, pr1 h₁ ⟧)
(p : m ◃ pr1 α = m ◃ pr1 β),
has_equifier_ump (make_equifier_cone i m p)
∑ (i : slice_bicat b) (m : slice_bicat b ⟦ i, h₁ ⟧)
(p : m ◃ α = m ◃ β),
has_equifier_ump (make_equifier_cone i m p)

  
B: bicat
ins_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b

α, β: f₁ ==> f₂

  (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂) (pr1 α) 
  (pr1 β): ∑ (i : B) (m : B ⟦ i, pr1 h₁ ⟧)
(p : m ◃ pr1 α = m ◃ pr1 β),
has_equifier_ump (make_equifier_cone i m p)
B ⟦ pr1 (make_ob_slice (pr12 e · pr2 h₁)), pr1 h₁ ⟧
B: bicat
ins_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
f₁, f₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
α, β: f₁ ==> f₂
e:= ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) 
  (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂) (pr1 α) 
  (pr1 β): ∑ (i : B) (m : B ⟦ i, pr1 h₁ ⟧)
(p : m ◃ pr1 α = m ◃ pr1 β),
has_equifier_ump (make_equifier_cone i m p)
invertible_2cell
  (pr2 (make_ob_slice (pr12 e · pr2 h₁)))
  (?g · pr2 h₁)
B: bicat
ins_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
f₁, f₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
α, β: f₁ ==> f₂
e:= ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) 
  (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂) (pr1 α) 
  (pr1 β): ∑ (i : B) (m : B ⟦ i, pr1 h₁ ⟧)
(p : m ◃ pr1 α = m ◃ pr1 β),
has_equifier_ump (make_equifier_cone i m p)
make_1cell_slice ?g ?α ◃ α =
make_1cell_slice ?g ?α ◃ β
B: bicat
ins_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
f₁, f₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
α, β: f₁ ==> f₂
e:= ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) 
  (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂) (pr1 α) 
  (pr1 β): ∑ (i : B) (m : B ⟦ i, pr1 h₁ ⟧)
(p : m ◃ pr1 α = m ◃ pr1 β),
has_equifier_ump (make_equifier_cone i m p)
(λ p : make_1cell_slice ?g ?α ◃ α =
       make_1cell_slice ?g ?α ◃ β,
 has_equifier_ump
   (make_equifier_cone
      (make_ob_slice (pr12 e · pr2 h₁))
      (make_1cell_slice ?g ?α) p)) 
  ?pr1

  
B: bicat
ins_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
f₁, f₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
α, β: f₁ ==> f₂
e:= ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) 
  (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂) (pr1 α) 
  (pr1 β): ∑ (i : B) (m : B ⟦ i, pr1 h₁ ⟧)
(p : m ◃ pr1 α = m ◃ pr1 β),
has_equifier_ump (make_equifier_cone i m p)
B ⟦ pr1 (make_ob_slice (pr12 e · pr2 h₁)), pr1 h₁ ⟧
 exact (pr12 e).
  
B: bicat
ins_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
f₁, f₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
α, β: f₁ ==> f₂
e:= ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) 
  (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂) (pr1 α) 
  (pr1 β): ∑ (i : B) (m : B ⟦ i, pr1 h₁ ⟧)
(p : m ◃ pr1 α = m ◃ pr1 β),
has_equifier_ump (make_equifier_cone i m p)
invertible_2cell
  (pr2 (make_ob_slice (pr12 e · pr2 h₁)))
  (pr12 e · pr2 h₁)
 apply id2_invertible_2cell.
  
B: bicat
ins_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
f₁, f₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
α, β: f₁ ==> f₂
e:= ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) 
  (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂) (pr1 α) 
  (pr1 β): ∑ (i : B) (m : B ⟦ i, pr1 h₁ ⟧)
(p : m ◃ pr1 α = m ◃ pr1 β),
has_equifier_ump (make_equifier_cone i m p)
make_1cell_slice (pr12 e)
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pr12 e · pr2 h₁)) ◃ α =
make_1cell_slice (pr12 e)
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pr12 e · pr2 h₁)) ◃ β
 abstract
      (use eq_2cell_slice ; cbn ;
       exact (pr122 e)).
  
B: bicat
ins_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
f₁, f₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
α, β: f₁ ==> f₂
e:= ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) 
  (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂) (pr1 α) 
  (pr1 β): ∑ (i : B) (m : B ⟦ i, pr1 h₁ ⟧)
(p : m ◃ pr1 α = m ◃ pr1 β),
has_equifier_ump (make_equifier_cone i m p)
(λ p : make_1cell_slice 
         (pr12 e)
         (id2_invertible_2cell (pr12 e · pr2 h₁)) ◃ α =
       make_1cell_slice 
         (pr12 e)
         (id2_invertible_2cell (pr12 e · pr2 h₁)) ◃ β,
 has_equifier_ump
   (make_equifier_cone
      (make_ob_slice (pr12 e · pr2 h₁))
      (make_1cell_slice 
         (pr12 e)
         (id2_invertible_2cell (pr12 e · pr2 h₁))) p))
  (equifiers_in_slice_bicat_subproof B ins_B b h₁ h₂
     f₁ f₂ α β)
 
B: bicat
ins_B: has_equifiers B
b: B
h₁, h₂: slice_bicat b
f₁, f₂: slice_bicat b ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
α, β: f₁ ==> f₂
e:= ins_B (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) 
  (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂) (pr1 α) 
  (pr1 β): ∑ (i : B) (m : B ⟦ i, pr1 h₁ ⟧)
(p : m ◃ pr1 α = m ◃ pr1 β),
has_equifier_ump (make_equifier_cone i m p)
has_equifier_ump
  (make_equifier_cone
     (pr1 (make_ob_slice (pr12 e · pr2 h₁)))
     (pr1
        (make_1cell_slice 
           (pr12 e)
           (id2_invertible_2cell (pr12 e · pr2 h₁))))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (equifiers_in_slice_bicat_subproof B ins_B b
           h₁ h₂ f₁ f₂ α β)))

    exact (pr222 e).
Defined.
